name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Vaccine Passports Coming - TAKE ACTION NOW
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Have you seen the news in the last 24 hours? Things are getting crazy. The [CDC just stated](https://www.action4liberty.com/the_birth_of_vaccine_passports_biden_says_get_vaccinated_or_wear_mask?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=2) that fully vaccinated people do not need to wear masks. Took them long enough! Sounds good on the surface, right? But more likely it's just setting the stage for what we have all feared: VACCINE PASSPORTS! Here's what Biden just tweeted out: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/the_birth_of_vaccine_passports_biden_says_get_vaccinated_or_wear_mask?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=3) **Are you kidding me? How on earth is that going to be regulated if not for a vaccine identification system?!** Look what's happening in Ohio. Governor Walz' Republican Twin, Governor Mike DeWine, [just announced a new program](https://www.action4liberty.com/governor_dewine_walz_republican_twin_creates_million_dollar_prize_for_getting_vaccine?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=4) in his state. His Dept of Health will award 5 people a Million Dollar Prize through a lottery system if they get vaccinated. Don't ever underestimate the great lengths that Lockdown Governors and Power Hungry Executives will take to ensure you comply with their unilateral dictates. It's permanent mask mandates or vaccines - either way, they want YOU to comply with them. Even if they have to pay a couple people a million bucks to lure in the masses!
## But we refuse and will NEVER GIVE IN TO TYRANTS!
That's why we need you to reach out to your Senator immediately. Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka is cutting backroom deals with Governor Walz right now. If they agree on a budget without passing the [**Never Again Bill**](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=5) first, it will destroy our opportunity to stop Walz from creating a vaccine passport program here. Don't let these senators fund the same government that is being used to attack our beloved businesses and enforce these anti-science, anti-liberty restrictions. **Don't let Gazelka cut a final deal with Democrats. DEMAND that your state senator REFUSES to vote for a final budget deal UNTIL the Never Again Bill is passed into law.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=6 "WHO REPRESENTS ME") [WHO REPRESENTS ME](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=7)
---
We can win and stop this budget if we all do our part to call, email and talk to everyone we know about this.
The time is NOW!
**These final days of the legislative session are too important for us to remain quiet. We MUST DEMAND they listen to us.**
**
No Deals. No Budget until the Never Again Bill is Passed into Law!!!**
We need to let them know that they will have a massive political problem on their hand if they fund Governor Walz' agencies without passing the **Never Again Bill** first!
[**Call your senator now. But if that's not your cup of tea, you can help by contributing $25, $50 or $100 to our large, paid phone calling and ad campaigns IMMEDIATELY. We MUST keep the pressure on these weak Republicans.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=8)
We simply can't allow Walz to implement permanent mask mandates or a vaccine passport program in Minnesota!
**When these politicians hear from you, it makes a difference!**
With your help, we can End Walz' Emergency Powers, stop the Budget and pass the Never Again bill.
Can I count on you?
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_dollar_prize&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Congressman Fitzgerald
subject: Police are under attack. Will YOU stand with them?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Back the badge with Scott Fitzgerald This **Police Week** , the men and women of our law enforcement are under attack like never before.The radical left is trying to make law enforcement the ENEMY, with calls to "Defund the Police," riots, protests, and even unhinged rhetoric from elected officials. The result? Violent attacks on the police, harassment every day, and now even a critical shortage of men and women willing to join the force. **All this AGAINST the men and women who keep our families safe.[The left MUST be stopped.](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhuljdd-ahkdjtlkr-r/)** [[ JOIN CONGRESSMAN FITZGERALD ] - Back The Badge!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhuljdd-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhuljdd-ahkdjtlkr-j/) As you may know, this is personal for me. As the son and the father of former law enforcement myself, I am proud to fight AGAINST the Democrats' efforts to Defund The Police in Congress.I voted against their radical Defund the Police bill, and I even took to the floor of the House to call out the left's efforts to de-fund and de-value the work of those who keep us safe. THIS is what the left wants to prioritize with its majority. We are only FIVE SEATS away from taking back the majority in Congress, and sending these radical leftists back out of power! **Please, take a moment to join me, and send a crystal-clear message that the people of the United States back the badge. [Click here to join me and SUPPORT our law enforcement!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhuljdd-ahkdjtlkr-t/)**-Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhuljdd-ahkdjtlkr-i/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mhuljdd-ahkdjtlkr-d/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

| | Friend, Passing adult-use cannabis in the DFL-led Minnesota House is a historic step forward for so many reasons.
Our legislation establishes responsible regulation, improves the medical cannabis program, helps veterans, and addresses unacceptable racial disparities. This is a new day and we worked diligently over the last two years to build a nation-leading cannabis law.

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Bringing real justice reform to Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NnyBGczJQeNV6UWb7RzUXbbs4Ei-VjNAyRO163wfuJc=/q-3C21uZ34jv0smQKy2NB2oQBQTZQuv_75_ApT74RFU=)
---
Friend, Over the past four years, we've made monumental progress on justice reform. We've ended no-knock warrants and become the first state in the South to both abolish the death penalty and legalize marijuana. This November, Republicans will stop at nothing to turn back our progress. _**That 's why I'm proud to endorse Jay Jones to be our next Attorney General.**_ Jay is running for Attorney General because he knows that while we've made progress in building a more fair and equitable Virginia, we still have plenty more work to do. [**I 'm asking you directly - please contribute $20 to Jay's historic campaign to become Virginia's first Black Attorney General today so we can build on the progress we've made together.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NnyBGczJQeNV6UWb7RzUXbbs4Ei-VjNAyRO163wfuJc=/q-3C21uZ34jv0smQKy2NB2oQBQTZQuv_75_ApT74RFU=) The vestiges of slavery and Jim Crow live on in our Commonwealth's criminal code, in our judicial system, and in our policing. They criminalize Black and Brown communities and make every Virginian less safe. Jay is the leader who will rise to meet this historic moment in our country and in our Commonwealth to create real change in our justice system. Take care, Ralph Northam **[P.S. Click here to read Jay 's full Justice Reform plan!](https://act.myngp.com/el/NnyBGczJQeNV6UWb7RzUXbbs4Ei-VjNAyRO163wfuJc=/S160q0FBYmt9PqgxxOqFxm-3dfDLDwlN_b7dtrgwycE=)**

name: Nuestro PAC
subject: Help us mobilize Latino voters early
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nuestro PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29157116/285508894/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlNDg3MTY5LWMxYjQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sp2yLRNmXX3N4YBqJ8z-D3nxPgK_MxzNWqdfF0CkN8M=)

Friends -
In 2020, Democrats achieved the highest turnout in history and ultimately won control of the White House and Congress.
Still, the Latino vote cost Democrats wins they were counting on in House races. 7 out of 15 of those races had significant Latino populations.
Data shows that the Latino vote moved an average of _**9 points**_ from Democrats to Republicans in the 2020 election compared to 2016 turnout. In places like Miami-Dade County and the Rio Grande Valley, that average spiked to a difference of _**over 20 points**_ from 2016 to 2020.
It’s blatantly clear that Democrats have a “Latino vote” problem.
There was no lack of money raised in 2020. Democrats outspent Republicans 3 to 1.
There was a lack of early investment to connect with Latino voters, lack of culturally competent content, and poor messaging.
In 2020, Latinos showed that they do turn out to vote, they are a persuadable universe, and they are not a monolith.
The moral of the story is, Democrats need to start working now to overcome the problems they encountered with courting Latino voters last cycle. As a party, we need to prioritize Latino voters the same way we prioritize white swing voters.
We fix this problem starting now.
**[IT’S NOT TOO EARLY TO START COURTING LATINO VOTERS -- CONTRIBUTE TO NUESTRO PAC TODAY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29157117/285508895/1999088365?refcode=em-210514&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlNDg3MTY5LWMxYjQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sp2yLRNmXX3N4YBqJ8z-D3nxPgK_MxzNWqdfF0CkN8M=)**
Help us reach out to Latino voters in a culturally competent way to protect our Democratic majority in 2022.
Thanks for your help.
-Nuestro PAC

************[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29157118/285508896/1999088365?refcode=em-210514&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlNDg3MTY5LWMxYjQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sp2yLRNmXX3N4YBqJ8z-D3nxPgK_MxzNWqdfF0CkN8M=)************

name: Steve Daines
subject: The Bidens’ China Problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
Add your name to my “Get Hunter Biden Out of China!” Demand to the White House today! | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=51d96996139640b6b6cff1640f341565&_e=HSrVm8pAmEi9uulbPXXx74Ja4i-lPO4LiPKP2Vo8rgkmtA2VjKWXMyQ_WW6zRxAeBstT-0q40dSaORv99SLVNUQYqNf5iZlyfQM7HsEqj0_F_lER57AeDLX3gXlRXXx_ow-MRsp95B7ExNmUDpKiUmEY9XHX9_OawrqTCwV7EmhoClN9fiLrmzto2ImBPasx1v95Qn66d7tkDaM3bXqV7T1lAMfudYcRpAtuJfqGCrlcnu-YGXF0Q4oo21TvaJTeY_1lvl8ps7oUQQ2sat6WrByVukNDaXkqHcBBdlpKer8Ywxqz7ZjzoKOsTxMxxsJwu9xuTYD53LbsBQgg3PY-FyjoDkjx9ib5KVkFxQ3u0yt-e3OpjXkhnD3Myoy60Z203UJEXXknvrI8-o3fd2cR7SZPu6lybjx_kmcDY0sV0xLKtQPYu0KJsew_hr6nEdwECdTxHhpEUW5zqQBk1_9Gs_A1jSMsD8n8-GqMSNJvfNUQ1AqeOzWTj3rvjFfxhZoYQZB07SVYfp6clgpPhuOBEA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative.

When **Joe Biden** was running for President last year, he insisted that _“no one in my family... will have any business relationship with anyone that relates to a foreign corporation or a foreign country. Period. Period. End of story.”_

Fellow Conservative, we all know talk is cheap, so shouldn’t now-President Biden insist that his clear-cut pronouncement is actually true?

It seems that once again, Joe Biden was willing to make assurances to the voters that just aren’t so - because his son **Hunter Biden** _still_ holds a stake in a Chinese equity firm - now over 100 days into his father’s term.

That’s why I sent a letter to President Biden reminding him of his very own words, that his son continues to have financial interests in Communist China, and that this obvious conflict of interest is exactly what he vowed would not occur.

Fellow Conservative, as President of the United States, it is critical to avoid any appearance of conflict of interests with foreign governments, **particularly adversaries such as China.**

That’s why Joe Biden needs to tell his son to immediately divest in any and all foreign investments - **_“period,” “end of story”_** - and **[I need your help to make sure he knows it and is held accountable for his promises.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=51d96996139640b6b6cff1640f341565&_e=HSrVm8pAmEi9uulbPXXx74Ja4i-lPO4LiPKP2Vo8rgkmtA2VjKWXMyQ_WW6zRxAeBstT-0q40dSaORv99SLVNUQYqNf5iZlyfQM7HsEqj0_F_lER57AeDLX3gXlRXXx_ow-MRsp95B7ExNmUDpKiUmEY9XHX9_OawrqTCwV7EmhoClN9fiLrmzto2ImBPasx1v95Qn66d7tkDaM3bXqV7T1lAMfudYcRpAtuJfqGCrlcnu-YGXF0Q4oo21TvaJTeY_1lvl8ps7oUQQ2sat6WrByVukNDaXkqHcBBdlpKer8Ywxqz7ZjzoKOsTxMxxsJwDDkZmcPNS0guA8GK413OvfuGbHMf7bbLNeB7xtHhlIOtde1cuK6w0xBoDNMgV3SDayHqh5eYFrPBAHUOf2N-7j2Y6lLLeWX8PKYbudp2CePqAMNil1S9dYNANMV9ibGGoNJ7CBNHd9qIUVyxa3iJk8kKyQ3-zlacJlRUMRzsODUMJT85L7TCuMlY-_Ew6XVEmwLW5yfY6_hFFrmdguFfGw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Add your name to my “Get Hunter Biden Out of China!” Demand to the White House today! | Fellow Conservative. When Joe Biden was running for President last year, he insisted that “no one in my family... will have any business relationship with anyone that relates to a foreign corporation or a foreign country. Period. Period. End of story.” Fellow Conservative, we all know talk is cheap, so shouldn’t now-President Biden insist that his clear-cut pronouncement is actually true? It seems that once again, Joe Biden was willing to make assurances to the voters that just aren’t so - because his son Hunter Biden still holds a stake in a Chinese equity firm - now over 100 days into his father’s term. That’s why I sent a letter to President Biden reminding him of his very own words, that his son continues to have financial interests in Communist China, and that this obvious conflict of interest is exactly what he vowed would not occur. Fellow Conservative, as President of the United States, it is critical to avoid any appearance of conflict of interests with foreign governments, particularly adversaries such as China. That’s why Joe Biden needs to tell his son to immediately divest in any and all foreign investments - “period,” “end of story” - and Will you please join me now and Fellow Conservative, President Biden needs to follow through and live up to his own avowed requirements of his family, Thank you, Fellow Conservative - Thank you, Senator Steve Daines | Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Don't want to receive our emails? e

name: Team Franchot
subject: Our democracy is under attack
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
We just want to make sure that you saw Peter Franchot’s recent email about combating voter suppression, and had a chance to add your name to our petition to America’s business leaders urging them to demand free, open and honest elections nationwide.
Marylanders have an incredibly important role to play in the fight to protect voting rights around the country. The louder we can be, the greater chance we have to succeed in this push -- so make sure to add your name today! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/n9SZMecQB02CJzRo7vnp-g2?source=Active2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
Forwarded Message Below:
American democracy is under assault.
According to the Brennan Center for Justice, this year legislators in 47 states have introduced hundreds of voter suppression bills that collectively aim to limit absentee voting, seek stricter voter ID requirements, threaten voter roll purges, and introduce other tactics that suppress the vote. As of this April, the states that have seen the largest number of voter suppression bills introduced include Texas, Georgia, and Arizona.
These bills are particularly insidious in how they disproportionately target our communities of color and low-income communities. Just weeks ago, I’m sure you heard about Georgia’s voter suppression law, which President Joe Biden called “Jim Crow in the 21st Century.” That shameful legislation inspired a strong nationwide response, including from business leaders.
This kind of activism was a step in the right direction -- and I think we need to go even further. We need to keep the pressure on while voter suppression bills continue to be considered by states around the nation. Though we’re lucky to have a legislature in Maryland that is deeply committed to protecting and expanding voting rights for everyone, that doesn’t mean that Marylanders can’t get involved in the fight to protect voting rights around the country.
That’s why today, I am asking you to join me in petitioning business leaders to urge them to advocate for open, free and honest elections nationwide, and sustain that call in the weeks ahead. This must be a movement of deep conviction showing our commitment to democracy. And by “voting with our wallets” by supporting businesses who actively support democracy, we can make our values known day-in and day-out. Together, as advocates, we can build the critical mass of grassroots support that we need to make our voices heard across the country.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/n9SZMecQB02CJzRo7vnp-g2?source=Active2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/n9SZMecQB02CJzRo7vnp-g2?source=Active2]Only months ago, Donald Trump’s baseless lies about voter fraud fomented insurrection at the US Capitol. Now, the former President’s lies continue to threaten our democracy by inspiring legislation, supported by radical lawmakers, that threatens to make it even more difficult for millions of people to vote.
These anti-democracy extremists will stop at nothing to roll back voting rights, and unless we do something about it, our communities will continue to be targeted. That’s why we need to hit them where it hurts -- their wallets. By petitioning America’s business community to speak out forcefully and vocally against attacks on voting rights, we can make these radical lawmakers understand that Americans won’t stand for these shameful bills.
I’ve created this petition because I believe that Marylanders have a major role to play in the fight to protect and expand voting rights nationwide. And I hope you will join me.
This isn’t a partisan issue. This is about the survival of American democracy itself. I invite my friends of all political stripes to stand with me on this issue, and make our voices heard at a volume that cannot be ignored.
SIGN THE PETITION: Join me in urging America’s business community to advocate for open, free and honest elections nationwide. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/n9SZMecQB02CJzRo7vnp-g2?source=Active2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]P.S. We know how fatigued we all can get in the face of relentless attacks on our democracy. I am here to tell you: don't let them win. In the face of adversity, we must take a stand for our democracy. Please sign the petition, and share it with your friends, family and neighbors so that they can sign it too. This is our chance to make a difference.
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/n9SZMecQB02CJzRo7vnp-g2?source=Active2]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b8cefd49-fcb3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8/3c7ffe0c-c5b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdmZmUwYy1jNWI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oVkevE8nPhQhU2wx4XU3VQvjOq0tJpQs7-jJVAA7m3c=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Team Terry
subject: Donald Trump officially entered the VA Gov race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
He’s in for his man Glenn Trumpkin.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29159029/285516732/-2023814932?refcode=20210514_TT_5AK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjc5MDg3YS1jNWI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mSweVhYxYn0unXXzkBnuSeUaJqjVKvd7t5dQKaiQuZI=)

| | Derek, we’ll keep this brief.

Donald Trump officially entered the Virginia Governor’s race this week when he endorsed crazy-rich conservative culture-warrior Glenn Youngkin.

name: Eric Greitens
subject: Update on How Things Are Going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
Soros-Funded Prosecutor Kim Gardner Could Lose Law License for Misconduct in False Case Against Eric Greitens
---
| | | | | |
---
| Soros-Funded Prosecutor Kim Gardner Could Lose Law License for Misconduct in False Case Against Eric Greitens
As you know, a few weeks ago I announced that I'm running for the U.S. Senate to fight for the people of Missouri. Since then, a lot has happened.
A few weeks ago, [President Trump's pollster evaluated the race here in Missouri.](http://Because%20together,%20we%20can%20win.%20Together,%20we%20can%20save%20our%20republic.) He found that [we are dominating this race](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sWNFr7boHcbjlgYDpCSGbDfbhTBsp1AgKDIy_XrOV9B1JFZtnOdpdYplDELyPHzYN1V_asghOLfKFA_Vkb8ngs4zqpgGM9-ENBGawLxbfzGaB5YJgpLTePYT8nG5IJl8sgszocSmxGKbEPii4fqGlRO0C_fg4LWIoA-IVPI9Q44KIpmDIw31kTsnT7HtLokvA24AjinGz-Bkwv1HnNpO8b34-4m27bSYArcxfXR4Rznmi2Wi6zBnoxR9d78p-In2CUb2MO8QlOtB_rU0Mz75Ww==&c=279U4_jjW9pLdG3Hir7ApjMOVg6NFl8rp0ub6t5N-__Cr9qS81YidQ==&ch=WM4v4rnkcDG0lp9Gbn775tkCwDVwcKgR4ey91_o8JJRAEZwrEES32w==&jrc=1). The latest poll shows us at 44 percent and our nearest possible opponent at 9 percent.
Matter of fact, he used the term 'bar-fight-Intensity' when describing Greitens supporters.
That's just one of the reasons why Kimberly Guilfoyle, who you'll remember was a fierce defender of President Trump since 2016, [decided to become the National Chair of our campaign](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sWNFr7boHcbjlgYDpCSGbDfbhTBsp1AgKDIy_XrOV9B1JFZtnOdpdYfwH3KKlXp08SRM8PyMFSFjMDDGygQGvnLi70EIQ_akLqPi8xj1WvMGYHm9woo2SZJ3QoIOjwE56-abtAd7JvnzNGDGNdVxIlQ7wugSnoW5Nd5ikl5kbAQ5qUolN_f6TNuJCMX_-bpfB4IgIiL0zViHSCTc-zC0zHE50ThQWi6R4rVhH_Yjc54-MTOdJXrFlz0EegVWA9N3DSue4pPHCnFRjqbSH47BGQ==&c=279U4_jjW9pLdG3Hir7ApjMOVg6NFl8rp0ub6t5N-__Cr9qS81YidQ==&ch=WM4v4rnkcDG0lp9Gbn775tkCwDVwcKgR4ey91_o8JJRAEZwrEES32w==&jrc=1). It's why almost a dozen of President Trump's fiercest defenders, including former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani & Dennis Prager have come out to endorse our campaign.
"Not all Republicans are created equal. President Donald J. Trump exposed the reality that Republicans are not all conservatives, and even less are principled fighters," Kimberly Guilfoyle wrote.
She continued with, "Luckily for Trump Republicans in Missouri, Navy SEAL and former Governor Eric Greitens is both a true conservative and a dedicated fighter. Gov. Greitens stands ready to continue fighting for President Trump's America First agenda in the U.S. Senate."
Just last week, an investigation into George Soros-funded prosecutor Kim Gardner found over 60 instances of prosecutorial misconduct by Gardner and that she made 79 false statements to the judge, our team, and even her own investigators in her false case against me.
That means she is likely to lose her law license-- she'd be the first Soros-funded prosecutor in the country to be disbarred.
I was on with Judge Jeanine talking about just how dangerous these Soros-funded prosecutors have become.
[WATCH: Eric Greitens on Judge Jeanine: The Soros-funded DA empire across America could be crumbling.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sWNFr7boHcbjlgYDpCSGbDfbhTBsp1AgKDIy_XrOV9B1JFZtnOdpdYplDELyPHzYRbO8eZ_xTliFqcV9p6X1aop31_OHUEGh0-b7kOf31OTZ_EpDisi8u9vOUWGBK3-LDbmG1TrVVLa1kYzvEReWPeKR4Ppa_mDm3RKOy32_7jv-szENDEqWqA==&c=279U4_jjW9pLdG3Hir7ApjMOVg6NFl8rp0ub6t5N-__Cr9qS81YidQ==&ch=WM4v4rnkcDG0lp9Gbn775tkCwDVwcKgR4ey91_o8JJRAEZwrEES32w==&jrc=1)
So far in this campaign, we've traveled to all four corners of Missouri & we've met thousands of grassroots supporters who are ready to send an America First fighter to the US Senate-- not just another politician.
This campaign has been fueled by thousands of small-dollar donations from strong conservatives across Missouri and around the country.
We're going to work hard every single day and we're going to fight for you.
I need you on the team. Join the mission by signing up for our team or donating to our campaign. Every person counts. Together, we can win. Together, we can save our republic.
[DONATE >>> Please make a contribution to help pro-Trump Navy SEAL Eric Greitens win the OPEN Senate seat in Missouri. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sWNFr7boHcbjlgYDpCSGbDfbhTBsp1AgKDIy_XrOV9B1JFZtnOdpdYplDELyPHzYa7z_yZxVTFz1zboQrRPxTUOCpMPiH_XhI6XgiNYrl9zkBkBCrQgqBbU7Jh3iKwU_RTRnrezsKKuPrW_rg896cdmjnX4iAJt91l_zhHXWU6MZTnw4mh1LizOEZ48Yalf4&c=279U4_jjW9pLdG3Hir7ApjMOVg6NFl8rp0ub6t5N-__Cr9qS81YidQ==&ch=WM4v4rnkcDG0lp9Gbn775tkCwDVwcKgR4ey91_o8JJRAEZwrEES32w==&jrc=1)
Thank you for your support.
On to victory!
Eric Greitens

clean_body: The next wave (hint: it’s cicadas) NDTC-TLDR-Logo ( ) APRIL SHOWERS ARE BRINGING A BIT MORE THAN MAY FLOWERS IN 2021: But once the wave of cicadas passes, our trainings will have you prepared to launch the next blue wave to sweep the nation. 🌊 🌊 And if you aren't sure what we're talking about, keep reading to the end and find out if Brood X is coming to a town near you! 🐜 🚨 LAST CHANCE: Calculating Your Vote Goal ( ) TOMORROW, 1pm ET Your vote goal is a BIG deal. It impacts everything from the number of volunteer shifts you need to the amount of money you have to raise for mailers. So wouldn’t you want to learn how to calculate it from the experts? Join us tomorrow at 1pm ET to do just that! RSVP NOW → ( ) 🚨 LAST CHANCE: Fundraising in Action: How to Ask for Money ( ) TOMORROW, 2pm ET Whether you’re running for school board or Congress, odds are the hardest thing you’ll have to do is ask folks for money. That’s why tomorrow we’re hosting an entire training focused on helping YOU engage with donors like a pro. RSVP now! RSVP NOW → ( ) Earned Media: Writing to Get Coverage ( ) Monday, May 17, 1pm ET There’s a reason it’s called earned media — you have to work to get it. Join us Monday and learn from the experts how you can build a plan to get the media coverage you need to win. RSVP NOW → ( ) Do You Want to Run for Office? ( ) Tuesday, May 18, 1pm ET Want to run for office? Well, you’ve probably got a question or two. And we have the answers! Join us on Tuesday at 1pm ET and learn how you can evaluate if and when running for office is right for you, and how to get started. RSVP NOW → ( ) Article Spotlight: The Political Candidate’s Guide to Online Trolls and Disinformation ( ) Fact: No one likes internet trolls. But how do you deal with them as a candidate? This article, written by someone who has gone through it all before, offers insight into how you can gracefully handle trolls and disinformation, and even become a better candidate for it. Check it out! READ NOW → ( ) 🐜 🐜 As promised: What is Brood X? When do cicadas come out in 2021? Answering your buggiest questions. ( ) Sorry if we're breaking this news to you, but trillions of cicadas are preparing to emerge from their 17 year slumber. Wondering if your town will soon be engulfed by the sweet serenades of the Brood X wave? Check out this article from The Washington Post to learn more! ( ) READ NOW → ( ) — The NDTC Team

clean_body: I have one quick question for you. Do you think it’s time for new leadership in California? Right now, our state is facing: Outrageous unemployment... Peter, Right now, our state is facing: Outrageous unemployment rates A spiraling homelessness crisis Rising violent crime rate Closed schools and businesses While other governors are helping their states safely reopen, California remains one of the most locked down states in the nation. Our unemployment rate is higher than nearly any other state in the country. Our infrastructure is failing, our families are struggling, and our state government isn’t doing a thing to help. Thank you for sharing your opinion with us, and thank you for your support. Doug Ose | | PAID FOR BY OSE FOR GOVERNOR Click to unsubscribe.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: We’ve done the math
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We know our opponents will spend big, and we need to prepare now rather than being behind when our race heats up.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210514-2078-header&t=1&akid=2078%2E2526796%2EaHANjo)
In this email, we’re going to ask if you’re able to pitch in towards our mid-May fundraising goal of raising 7,500 contributions by this Saturday. But we want to explain why our May 2021 goal is so important — and how your donation will make a powerful difference.
Did you know that last year Alexandria had the second-most expensive House race in the entire country? **One of her opponents in 2020 raised more than $10 million _alone_.** That’s because we’re a top target for Republicans and wealthy right-wing donors.
We can expect our next race to be just as expensive, so we’ve done the math to determine how much we need to raise this year, month-by-month, to remain competitive. But right now we’re about halfway through May, and we’re not halfway towards our goal. Based on our average contribution, we need to raise at least 7,500 contributions by this Saturday to stay on track.
[When we set a goal of 7,500 contributions by Saturday’s deadline, we’re serious about hitting it. Because we know our opponents will spend big, and we need to prepare now rather than being behind when our race heats up. Can you chip in $3 right now to add one more contribution towards our mid-month fundraising goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210513-2?refcode=em20210514-2078-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2078_2526796_aHANjo&akid=2078%2E2526796%2EaHANjo)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210513-2?refcode=em20210514-2078-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2078_2526796_aHANjo&akid=2078%2E2526796%2EaHANjo)**
Your contribution today could help get Alexandria’s message out to someone who has never heard it before. It could help a young voter get registered for the first time, or it could help train a new volunteer on how to share important conversations about the issues our neighbors care about. Each grassroots donation directly translates into growing our movement. Thank you for making all of this possible.
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210513-2?refcode=em20210514-2078-P&t=23&refcode2=2078_2526796_aHANjo&akid=2078%2E2526796%2EaHANjo)**

clean_body: Our conservative movement is booming with you on our team. ** . == Friend, I am thrilled that our conservative movement is booming, and I could not be happier to have you on the team. I would not be in Congress advocating for our shared conservative values without you. That's why I have been working to secure something really special that I think you will appreciate. For the next 24 hours, there is a 5X-Match on ALL DONATIONS made to my page. Here is what's possible if every member of my team chips in $10 with this exclusive match: ✔️ We will have the resources to stand up to the Democrats dark money ✔️ Conservatives will have the momentum to RETAKE the House Majority ✔️ Republicans will ensure that conservative voices are heard | == == == It's essential that you and fellow conservatives take advantage of incredible opportunities like this, because I know that the Far Left won't take this lying down. We have to keep up with every move they make so they do not get the upper hand. Nancy Pelosi is all too ready to silence anyone who dares to question her authority.** So please, Friend, now is the time to make a difference. I hope you'll take advantage of this opportunity! Thank you, Michelle Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativevictory2020.net powered by

body:

clean_body: We’re pacing behind where we should be = Hi friend, We wanted to give you an update on where our numbers stand for May. The truth is, we’re pacing behind where we should be almost halfway through the month. = These donations are so important at this point in the campaign. If we fall behind now, it’s going to be harder to catch up later. We can’t afford to slow our momentum. We are building a campaign the right way, through grassroots supporters that give $10 here, $25 there. It might not seem like a lot, but when everyone pitches in, it all adds up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Team O'Halleran **Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. name: Leader Joanna McClinton
subject: Leader McClinton Endorses Lori Dumas for Commonwealth Court!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
body:
Dear Friend,

I'm writing to ask for your support for Judge Lori Dumas, in her campaign for Commonwealth Court.

Judge Dumas has nearly two decades of experience on the bench serving the citizens of Philadelphia as a Common Pleas Judge. There she has fought for fair and equal justice for our most vulnerable children and families. Now she is running to bring that same commitment to equal justice to the Commonwealth Court.

**[_Can you support Judge Dumas with a contribution today to help her in her campaign for Commonwealth Court?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29168147/285543481/1565234157?emci=95cf3ab5-f8b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=cd6a1ae9-abb4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=619100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWNhMGUwMi1kNmI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F2XybrUCiWroPKu2Zrbd6OyR1jfLxjKFlvum2W_tmWM=)**

Judge Dumas has been recommended by the PA Bar Association and when elected she would be the _only person of color_ on Pennsylvania's Commonwealth Court. All our neighbors and friends would greatly benefit from having her diverse experience and voice on this court, now more than ever.

[**_Please join me by making a contribution to her campaign today and by committing to vote for her on May 18th._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29168148/285543483/1565234157?emci=95cf3ab5-f8b3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=cd6a1ae9-abb4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=619100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWNhMGUwMi1kNmI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F2XybrUCiWroPKu2Zrbd6OyR1jfLxjKFlvum2W_tmWM=)

The Commonwealth Court, where such crucial issues like voting access and election protection cases are heard, needs someone like Judge Dumas and her commitment to fair and equal justice. She's prepared, passionate, and will bring a new perspective - that's why I am supporting her election.

Please vote for Judge Lori Dumas on or before May 18th.

Sincerely,
Rep. Joanna McClinton
Democratic Leader, Pennsylvania House of Representatives

Paid for by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
PO Box 40606
Phialdelpha, PA 19107
United States

name: Sharif Street
subject: From the Allegheny Mountains to the Schuylkill River
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARIF STREET FOR PA
body:
I’m so excited to embark on this listening tour across our expansive Commonwealth to listen to the issues that face Pennsylvanians from all walks of life. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29169853/285549580/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWY0ZjYwMi1kYWI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KShMhfe8f4eqCeFjF4loiFNOeVMy476fCJu4wyoaVQ=&emci=df5fab7a-07b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=19f4f602-dab4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=15053672) | Peter, I’m so excited to embark on this listening tour across our expansive Commonwealth to listen to the issues that face Pennsylvanians from all walks of life. It’s been my privilege to represent the people of Philadelphia in the Pennsylvania State Senate and advocate for groundbreaking progressive policies like banning chokeholds and fighting to pass cannabis legalization. I know these issues will help make Pennsylvania a safer, more equitable place for all our residents, but I want to hear about all the other issues facing our state directly from voters. Whether it’s the overprescription of opioids or the abuse of heroin, families across Pennsylvania are dealing with the devastating effects of addiction and overdose. I want to learn more about how this crisis is directly affecting communities around the Commonwealth and what resources they need to overcome it. [**This listening tour is so important to forming the foundation of my potential run for Senate, which is why I’m emailing you now. My team and I set a goal to raise $5,000 in small-dollar donations to fund this trip by Saturday night. I know that the first step of being a good leader is being a good listener, and that’s what I intend to do.
With the fate of the Senate hanging in the balance and Pennsylvania’s open seat rated as the number one opportunity for Democrats to flip a seat, this will be one of the most watched races of 2022.
[**That’s why I want to do this right. Help me listen to folks across our Commonwealth by donating any amount towards my listening tour.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29169869/285549598/900906502?refcode=E8614-20210514-Midmonth3-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWY0ZjYwMi1kYWI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KShMhfe8f4eqCeFjF4loiFNOeVMy476fCJu4wyoaVQ=)
Thank you so much for all your support.

**\---------- Forwarded message ---------**
**From: Sean Parnell
Date: Wed, May 12, 2021 at 1:55 PM
Subject: We can't afford to come up short, Friend**

Just days ago, I announced my campaign for US Senate in Pennsylvania and the support we have received has been incredible.

We are prepared for what will be the most important race of the 2022 election and will decide who controls the Senate.

body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7023e8e76d5a421e826ca716b8dab8b4&_e=aXhgdxfq1DTiInFzwxp_ft18F4TbcUf4CqR_nepGJ9k7OCLaF2rzA8YU1LNt-zXZDH9A6x8sMG7zPt4uOTOIVrnqR9JBDdykypq8kmzoUwOpnzQExntdVBthAnAZLvq80JaR7rfuKjrV6Ha3x4yZoo8G3Rjd7vSPyEouvwr5K2LkOeUm7l2yaublR49xsyOD1Qq_zOBk3pVkZ9KR2JvT_uaIx-Qn6JNs8RhWN6czERNqbhIC41vP-jhe1Abiez7KjjwrPSwb6k9LqYMTliuyx7ZBBMyG5KAUC6_EPEX9Voc%3D) **We Stand With Israel 🇺🇸🇮🇱 ****
** Millions of Israeli citizens spent their nights in bomb shelters this week, while Hamas [launched](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7023e8e76d5a421e826ca716b8dab8b4&_e=aXhgdxfq1DTiInFzwxp_fjhzeW0S11rA2BXh_cjR8OmRFJ9OoEyjsxA3UULWiE9QxD5QlJteEzAxrAVB3Bfp7Me3qnonDTU4w-kRNXlIux4y4T102X_m2fmnsIPwlrTAY6t_gY_I0wA7zJAJ2QDtIgHf2Nj6D7yCRDGkeK_tCFqsOe-xOAHE5ATZhgB3ItF7JK_diXvI6ERXUwy1imFo0RlXuLRUWHilncHmWHCNJjqLk2AGe2efMgbDaQaBMnl_KaD4MU6hr2PJAURjjLrbq7XLe7uznT5W7vOfOXfFiwEz_KoSuCm9jzXW38mpAjPYrXO2PI0AyQwpXplAsxAs7pPb0qrAYD9J23jwgqQ_nlmDqMiKprwQHBkNab-AjeAS) more than 1,000 rockets from Gaza. The rockets targeted some of the most densely populated areas in Israel, including Jerusalem and Tel Aviv. I joined Rob Finnerty on Newsmax to discuss the conflict: [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7023e8e76d5a421e826ca716b8dab8b4&_e=aXhgdxfq1DTiInFzwxp_fmRGr-IvcsR_saziNWiWKfE0TQhiSotrq66edsOXQ7wJE6b3sdLTACHw1T7IOEMdmAvDxjv99134Up7Lgx71Odz_vQ8yQ9mGN5VY4QDH5r-2GmoJLmG4sHyJg5c_YEbgoitkUxJF61EmrJQVdks6BdrXaXBgvDIB8yN-LVFfOUQIj--AbbxysKJVGv4So2ndTtXs3UKy8ScuF_qKPw4KdUkKYC4I6fkgj8Krf9Aq5i8BrC8HNTL0c11_m-bIvVROzZcMY2PndzDYxJJNZXrSiAE%3D)
**Make no mistake: Hamas is a terrorist organization that wants to wipe the Jewish State off the map. Israel has every right to defend itself and its citizens. And America stands strongly with our ally.**

I have been vocal about my support for Israel. I Recently [demanded](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7023e8e76d5a421e826ca716b8dab8b4&_e=aXhgdxfq1DTiInFzwxp_flc55lzOcyhjrKS6WTQL_cA62Ss0QqL2oKpwseQOA1wV75ShJLYP1HdcK_WswRgh_TzYOhU97ct9MeMshU6SO9C2lTq2TKXL7lciuQR4JvG8eAeGfWRHWT_Y0cCEO7PTUlsftrdDfZz8vUrgmUQguWC7bIOSB59R69i6HEKURWjPqXEctUs23sSTtriPZgmNsVOqo0g3K0ZyvkPngaHkLMPPxaPmhLTTcmngKc-SKdjM2xkzzAyWLJx56BIoam9tlD9Lckawe-N0hNqABZRrX7ExXLEU93U1VksAZ3aLY5VEbK5ime6XCsAWDdEh2bw6sw%3D%3D) an investigation into the Democrat fundraising platform ActBlue, due to its possible links to terrorist organizations and anti-Israel groups.

Unfortunately, some on the left are clinging to their anti-Israel ways. Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib [spoke](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7023e8e76d5a421e826ca716b8dab8b4&_e=aXhgdxfq1DTiInFzwxp_fg2RYdB7_M6F55CdM6wUkt6CAX2X31tZ4EeqS_UP5jcMmL5-E0wSaoyXHBMpJSPEpL2f7Kc0y2HwIdH9wSPsasmYEQE9a-dh3caEhedJAnub9M8RFYBKXgnYUFuQOfxQIieu8H3Mpso0ySWmh9EKaTFyfDqtlhn65z7mbrh89NNQg8TVz9Nz9TB1P4RimjILtmHsPQ3eul8hBdFoX2Y8RGyt4ySgVKuXmvezq2MAiJryWEMKIPPpd6lF5uQqKmQ_LwbMPLEdEV_HUx24AWfCMJ6uw76KZFLb7BqT5vUrb-VA4bjFQt0lMSoTtVysyk60MT7S23suEc8T4TCABZ4Q4L-qqEnCost59U1O1qAviWCl4z9g2RUB-U9DYxMIUyTHSQ%3D%3D) at a fringe rally on Tuesday where radicals called for the elimination of the state of Israel, and Congresswoman Ilhan Omar wasted no time in [calling](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7023e8e76d5a421e826ca716b8dab8b4&_e=aXhgdxfq1DTiInFzwxp_flL5fJlI8DFREoCVOxftf3aJNCjpOUZf7nDPCSWHEQ2yZZkjMBpbNXIh17VWLkDigjwEsH1FaVqpv9U8xuspmdpVwtTSfZf29QN13U3mKLmHgvAKF-jSGKXqUPlhBrgnI9WjVtJYXu_SjD00yOkhDca48OewHksKiPkJPN-4LVWU5HPRu7qgMSev5jVY1RgceseIVfwtmMdNeOKTM7Fw2hg8vP-pSaKV06JppXEVFAybCXTRkZzlTRzYPRRihGvZisZyOYrT8THY7XNAteU8QDU%3D) Israel’s defense an act of terrorism. Even Bernie Sanders [blamed](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7023e8e76d5a421e826ca716b8dab8b4&_e=aXhgdxfq1DTiInFzwxp_flEDlGKPxc6vW4EMGyOV1a5NOYGBBIefYcCw7qqee85sflJprQzVqS2uKqhU8i8K-k0SzR8E6Oj7dw6v-EUH-XLWdRSEPK3-5G8hypBnuu7S--X0CFtglNUQq1-ZVQ6eXQVZjEu8JWSSqb6h-2XIjrxCGPL9DCWT02kPIZHzCTu0sxpDLO2IXDeVXFtHlANWYik4MOGBO5Sjs6_9MOpGmgT-X8cr_tOBPZH9WjslTh64X-MAfybM2uFswL6Oawt34XNUeFTu_dNeX2m4v3G73YKSwvoIUFyuSM4G3K50nVbms7eCvUZ31l52J3KvGYKndJiRbt1tvueNhB3mkMPau_9z5ajqprNV4gifYtvslcbr) Israel for the conflict, which [escalated](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7023e8e76d5a421e826ca716b8dab8b4&_e=aXhgdxfq1DTiInFzwxp_fjhzeW0S11rA2BXh_cjR8Ol3EJnRERPO9qjpVN0SSBchntSBADqxOt3Tw6Wkf8efcxK3RVw_yVDDJ5p8DC2PgEB4NJybNPgnyJZLBtWdyu3ceOImWOw4pkEXHbKCt3DT61UaTaHmBhfVMnZQ9f4BbDHlzElhGN_e58j47D3mDhaAZ87MvVLEpTnxsbZEywnvmvnrlF8B6VjkQhWGgKom2VEgr3_DKGkkrBWsubD3nTyqfDvjNIGiQB6tkioP2uUCUaIOhLeMk8HZvjnI3jxG087N9LdZbihwbZJNxhKDeZnmfOgMKJvtk08BT1_WbTTPjwU5RuUYUkFYG3wvhbQ4RRebhRbP24qN5IcX5Gwo4pfh) after Palestinians hurled rocks at Israelis from the Al Aqsa Mosque in Jerusalem.

So far, President Biden has supported Israel’s efforts to protect its citizens, but let’s not forget he also [restarted](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7023e8e76d5a421e826ca716b8dab8b4&_e=aXhgdxfq1DTiInFzwxp_ftI4yOVNp-eQvWdgXNn_n7FFAwSBD7Ror4vIzKEIr3p25UbHJe-QJet1TxMXjT4Vl0BlwBYPef74kI22d_aDO_QnbfTcwu-BsYmx6pCjsTHD70pKhUL6vl-Mw1zcmK83-Z0jNL5-oSoTfqG6ZU_Oi6FCpn4d05BmOZzH6dCCaNeXEXKQVDfwU6tmnimFjOtjMWGoUXXFJsxwjJ8U4zx0rI6Hg89hwa7QJTPlOd_AAVH3cXDsySg2NzdOmpxnzkOPoq6rJ24ZhF5cHhI1nHNMm02fkrYXMHJ0HD2N2AiyNsQhOABqGHiZHVU9OSsr1Luedg%3D%3D) Palestinian aid previously canceled by Donald Trump. | Peter,

We're about halfway through the quarter, and **we 're just shy of our goal.**

At the end of this quarter, we have to report our fundraising to the FEC and it becomes public. We want to show the national Republican groups who are flooding VA-07 with negative ads attacking Abigail on TV and on digital that **we are a people-powered campaign that is ready to fight back.**

[_**Will you consider a contribution to support Abigail 's re-election efforts so we can stay on track to reach our quarterly fundraising goal?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/uylQpLTRRbhN2ZQpVyHeRyOg9D63avOThmVbATPHF5Q=/fuIJTWz2ixVyqpYfweT0BXYaYdK9qveRjYRNhv5PbCQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210514-1-EM&amount=25)

Kathryn helped us immensely with our documentary about Obamacare, The Determinators. She was instrumental in educating and activating Americans in the fight against Obamacare. Kathryn is now in the fight against that awful enemy, cancer. She has been on 4 different types of chemo for 43 weeks, and is now going to try 2 new ones. [_**We’re about to reach our FEC mid-quarter deadline on May 15th, but we’re short of where we need to be for this point in the quarter. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support? DONATE [] SHOP [ isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: . Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: PJM Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
body:
| |
---
| Quick Update
It's been a busy 2021, so I wanted to share our quick update. If you have any questions or would like to be engaged in any way, please don't hesitate to let me know. Thanks for being a part of our team! - Patrick, patrick@patrickjmurphy.com Recent Attacks We have seen the SolarWinds attack last year, eleven ransomeware attacks on our law enforcement agencies since 2020, and now the sinister cyberextortion attack by DarkSide on the U.S. Colonial Pipeline, which affects 45% of the oil we use on the East Coast. We must take swift action on President Biden's upcoming Executive Order, establishing a Cyberspace Incident Review Board modeled loosely after the National Transportation Safety Board, and changes to Sarbanes-Oxley with incident reporting and information sharing. In my role as Senior Managing Director at Ankura & as a Commissioner on the US Cyberspace Solarium Commission, feel free to [reach out](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/fAcsXo-ac9GPC8c4WXOqmfmIbPNE8LIqnEcUn_z-gAM=) to me if I can be helpful. No One Left Behind A few months ago, I joined the board of No One Left Behind, an organization working to bring Iraqi and Afghani translators, who risked and sacrificed so much for our service members, to the United States. Military Appreciation Games As an Ambassador for the US Chamber of Commerce's Hiring Our Heroes program, I was proud to stand shoulder-to-should with the Philadelphia Flyers & 76ers this week for their Military Appreciation Games. With most American families relying on joint incomes and more than 25% of military spouses unemployed, there's a lot of work to do when it comes to military families. See our interview tonight on Sixers Pregame at about 7:30 on SportsNet Central! TTH US Senate Slate Launch With the least number of Veterans serving in political public service in the 21st Century, we're hoping you can join US Senator Tammy Duckworth and me at Taking The Hill's event this Tuesday 7pm on Zoom. Get your ticket [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/gb_hSVNaZNRHthWQ35OUWN_goZfXjrP46xWOZFS6UqY=)! KD Takes You To Erie "Where Erie County goes, so does the nation" \- who knew that Pennsylvania's northwestern-most county played such an important role in state and national politics? [Join us](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/oPRRyqyJU_vg1kG33VnSeTXlU8hh9kcBgVFJutUPiA8=) as the Kennedy Democrats take a deep-dive into Erie and Pennsylvania on Wednesday, May 26th. Apple TV's film "Cherry" Moderated a discussion with Anthony and Joe Russo, the Hollywood directors behind the Avengers movies, and several Veterans about the Apple film "Cherry," a movie starring Tom Holland as an Iraq War veteran. The film speaks to the struggles returning Veterans face when they return home from their service, and the panel dug deeper into these themes. Fort Campbell Attended the ceremony in which Major General JP McGee assumed command of the 101st Airborne Division at Fort Campbell. Also on that day, Adisa King, Class of 2000 (pictured) received his promotion to Colonel. Nancy Pelosi's LGBTQ History Maker Award Had the honor of presenting the LGBTQ history maker award to Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi on the 10 year anniversary of the repeal of "Don't Ask, Don't Tell," legislation I authored in Congress. Dispatcher Care Packages Was proud to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with my Marine buddy Kevin Schmiegel and Operation Gratitude as we made nearly 1000 care packages for Philadelphia's hard working Police and Fire Department dispatchers. Check out the [coverage](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/wnU37gQiIq4dJ6kqHdsymgEvLHtSM7zMFfXXSr3jHV0=?v=f6hRBWO2q1I). Cyberspace Solarium Commission My work as a commissioner on the bipartisan Cyberspace Solarium Commission is impacting national security as the Biden administration begins to implement USCSC recommendations. Wreaths Across America Spoke at the 28th Wreaths Across America's holiday ceremony, a celebration to honor and remember our Veterans during the holidays. I was able to take part at Washington Crossing National Cemetery, a cemetery I'm proud to have fought to create when I was in Congress. Join me in honoring our nation's fallen heroes this Memorial Day by taking part the [Travis Manion Foundation's Honor Project](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/-HDfDfmj20nUPZcHrSL_dHTIRppzfc-kTQX60FogXf8=). Solidarity of Service [Appeared](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/JTiXGKB-WaCni9_3da0p4sAAvjOjZ568VhsfqSLdGm8=) on the Solidarity of Service podcast, presented by Operation Gratitude. Hosts Kevin Schmiegel and Sherman Gillums, Jr. interviewed me about my family's service and how it affected my life and career. The Bridge [Appeared](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/R5axz1_n9lxj1A1zxkzCWIAYkiBKpUTyzwazhk5UZJ0=) on the podcast The Bridge where host Dr. Linda Fedrizzi-Williams, the President of Central Penn College, interviewed me about my service. Veteran Law Student Panel [Moderated](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/ZxrhI7GpAzQr8nRp7T6NaPLmo52Q5HinsVsHPU-va9M=) Holland & Knight's panel for law student Veterans on helping using their service to shape their careers. Military Operations Research Society Joined the Military Operations Research Society during one of their weekly sessions where we discussed Veterans' issues. Veteran Business Referral Network Spoke at the annual breakfast of the Greater Philadelphia Veteran Business Referral Network, an organization helping Veterans find employment and open their own businesses. Bucks County 2021 Primary In addition to the work we do with the Kennedy Democrats and Taking the Hill, we're proud to support Tiffany-Thomas Smith for Bucks County Court of Common Pleas and Antonetta Stancu for Bucks County District Attorney. Make a contribution here to [Tiffany](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/-oww84b_YW_ZjbyK_GZn1E8YJKtUHRQLTflDGRtO7Lg=) and [Antonetta](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/PTi5k2XXYhR-qpUl1SW24n75cl-aHSmu9oZK9-f5aho=). Military Bible Challenge At the beginning of Lent, I embarked on a Bible reading journey as part of the American Bible Society's Military Bible Challenge. It's a 75-day Bible reading plan broken up into five separate parts. Sign up for your own journey [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/uDzT91Ua7WwZxZPVyK0rcAuvEfy6ZKbYYwd2w-3x4gI=). KD Drinks and Drafts Event Kennedy Democrats hosted a Drinks and Drafts event, taking place on the first night of the NFL Draft featuring my classmates from the Congressional Class of 2006, Rep. Mike Arcuri, Sen. Joe Donnelly, and former Washington quarterback and US Congressman Heath Shuler in addition to Bucks County row officers Judi Reiss and Robin Robinson. KD also hosted a St. Patrick's Day celebration featuring Congressman Brendan Boyle, Chairman Bob Brady, and Kathleen Kennedy Townsend. Make sure to get [your tickets](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/oPRRyqyJU_vg1kG33VnSeTXlU8hh9kcBgVFJutUPiA8=) to the Erie event! TTH Spring into Service Event Taking The Hill hosted an event featuring Congressional Reps. Mikie Sherrill and Conor Lamb, and will be launching our US Senate slate with Sen. Tammy Duckworth this coming Tuesday! Join us at our US Senate Slate Launch this week on May 18 [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/gb_hSVNaZNRHthWQ35OUWN_goZfXjrP46xWOZFS6UqY=). Helpful Links If you want to keep updated on all the happenings with Team Murphy, please follow my [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/P56nZznz_fMUelJ4_Z37NwRFoSZkGLUk4V2Du3BQxMI=), [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/ncF2Pc8QUJHG3ZN34UP6wRHW6ILmjslrgSBFtwPU5zY=), and [Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/_YVveoy7wAJVjpnRGmVSVFkWYs-MvA1YP6fXPb5WPp4=) pages. For more information, check out my [website](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/nRYM7fQmTLJ7sOzVmTc2QMoMJo7Xll7UhiTjNjnqKQk=). Thanks for being a part of the team!
---|---
Copyright (C) 2021 Patrick J. Murphy. All rights reserved.

Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
---

Kennedy Democrats
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/_dhkPHBmpoELTq5lT9HJ-2hIYb7VgydybiomQbjeW80=/0AtdZO7YyThsbQMlpa85Qtr195FrCUzgsdrrDZSLM6Y=).

subject: fwd: proof that conservative leadership = results

body:
Did you see my team’s message on Tuesday? I included it below in case you missed it! Indiana’s new budget is more than just “historic” and “transform Friend, Did you see my team’s message on Tuesday? _I included it below in case you missed it!_ **Indiana’s new budget is more than just “historic” and “transformative.” It’s proof that common sense conservative leadership delivers RESULTS.** Hoosiers have yet to see a budget that’s out of balance under Governor Holcomb’s leadership. It’s incredible, and it’s why we were able to pay down burdensome state debts while making groundbreaking investments in education, infrastructure, and the Hoosier economy this time around. **Help spread the word about these Hoosier victories by sharing the news with your friends and family Friend,

_Have you ever paid off a credit card or a loan that was holding you back from financial freedom?_

We’ve all been there.

It’s an incredible feeling –– and if you’re like most people, paying off that debt motivates you to continue making smart, conservative, forward-thinking financial decisions.

**That’s exactly what Governor Holcomb was thinking when he was working on Indiana’s recently signed budget.**

This budget is transformative on every level and includes historic investments in job creation, education, and infrastructure –– but it wasn’t made overnight.

Under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, Hoosiers have **never** seen a budget that was out of balance. Four straight years of conservative fiscal management brought us to this point, and we’re seeing more of that same common sense money management in this new budget, including:
[](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=000ade637fef4b238a8eff26ea0192bc&_e=O-IX0hoXWqqVicmPzFXAajYBdudlQ7E1l7tT62ta_kmf2s8M56b93fkf66AzME4B54CroDQVBlr-YJ8rjHWVyEtI-_Lw6F69Ps8QKjntd6boE7Hmly0lM-TM_7l8EtNxeKoWLqms8G1-BQeJP6rkv97GRdYVGOiapLAF5Bl-0LizRLzFT-mFimfq2oNQuGmG2w6iDVHAP1geIrqOKT4-p0sEL3F2EwrKx-0KUPdqI0Yo-Lwi0N442DBxRDxLY43mkw5Rv7E6WWax6Q9D4NSLzDzcB164avu3tUwHXMKZbMktYyvH_JN5QGcyNk6zsTF603TC9cB0Zv_Mf1qOQpgB-Wm8BQoVKifhqlQjSRybqlBMuisG22_t-7G1WLOYt2U-rvNxJYpBG5jklyFf2Fyaq5UHB74YRTQ2pUvJGT6otPf-WD_-OSYA-K3dej9vTKhfJjy7DgZPxDTtJqArIDq3vg%3D%3D)

[**SHARE ON TWITTER**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=000ade637fef4b238a8eff26ea0192bc&_e=O-IX0hoXWqqVicmPzFXAatOvugoZr94WX2cv0_NSyg9yXfCgfwEoJ_mhshXwrJ1ktPFgZR8UDg8wXRksyWNZGKXTL0nnx_5cTZpsI7U7aZA8sJLffiWINfUG6sz6PRg13AT1XhJRqg_saV0X8ZPcUucKyYLpS_18BCJVob62ybgl7IGYBmwcIVTpSqzfZsI9Ny1CbnPc4Ye6d1jyBD4xdVsuKZqFu__EuqTqNBW3P9v3DXhwHfaGoq2gYT5mva42q0NhLoXRGzEJQB290vMi-z6CTSrTYOreFFT6vg9M5QYNmLXZhAbV1K1ThfgpbCuoht3yr80AZhbPle-DjsWMd-TKP_ue149OSMPihVUA1GjXRthAmdgdpG0M0eNgHmXCCzTG-JtJH9NLPm9Opa-utYcOmoJtQYTBH12eU7Nz94bt5meItS9Npd0blveWGGXsL6hoKWKjcxRqecrkQLC6taW1Z4PPckEoKZ2WrLfTYzLaSLpy8SQJziS_dz7RfxXq)
Governor Holcomb is paving the way for more future historic tax cuts, reforms, and investments that will make a major impact on Hoosier lives –– _even long after he leaves office!_

Thank you for reading, friend,–– keep an eye out on your inbox as we continue to keep you updated on what’s included in Indiana’s new budget!

Thank you,

\- Holcomb Crew

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: This fight is personal to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter,

Last week, American Action Network, a dark money, GOP super PAC funded by pharmaceutical companies launched dishonest attack ads against me for my work to lower prescription drug costs. This is a fight that is personal to me, so I hope you'll let me take a moment to explain why these attacks are so deeply frustrating.

When I was sixteen years old, I was diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes. Like the other 1.6 million people in this country with Type 1 diabetes, I depend upon insulin to stay alive. However, in the last 20 years, the price of insulin has skyrocketed -- jumping from $40 a vial to upwards of $300 with nothing -- nothing -- to justify this price hike.

Now, I'm one of the lucky ones. I have insurance that helps pay the cost of my insulin. But many of the families I cared for as a pediatrician struggled to afford the medications they relied on. So they'd ration their medication, cut pills in half, or skip taking them altogether. Now, if Americans didn't pay, on average, 3-4 times what people in other wealthy countries pay for their medications, my patients would not have to cut or skip doses.

We need fair pricing, because the best medications in the world won't help if you can't afford to buy them. And the skyrocketing cost of insulins, Humira, and epi-pens simply defies explanation. That is price gouging.

So I said, enough is enough.

**No one should have to choose between putting food on the table and paying for the medication they need. That's why, when I ran for Congress, I promised to take on the soaring price of prescription drugs. And that's exactly what I've been doing.**

I've fought in Congress to keep pharmaceutical companies from raising prices faster than the rate of inflation, to bring cheaper generic drugs to market sooner, and to give Medicare the power to negotiate better prices for all of us. I'll continue fighting until every family can afford the medication they need.

These attack ads are part of a $4 million dollar campaign, and we know this is only the beginning. Dark money groups will do and spend whatever it takes to replace me with a representative who will put their corporate interests before the needs of families in our district. Unlike them, I don't accept corporate PAC money -- I'm counting on you to help me fight back.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help me fight back against these GOP attacks and keep me in Congress fighting to lower the cost of prescription drugs?](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d940b/72735be7/30be32f4/1e1019c7/2874800451/VEsH/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may-2021?gpsid=8_30_18738&refcode=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+chip+in+5+or+more+before+our+mi")**

Thank you,

Kim

**National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?** | [DONATE](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d940b/72735be7/30be32f4/1e1019c6/2874800451/VEsE/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may-2021?gpsid=8_30_18738&refcode=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")
---

Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress

PO Box 2728
Issaquah, WA 98027

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d940b/72735be7/30be32f4/1e1019f9/2874800451/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.cp.bsd.net/page/s/update-your-email-address?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=3+-+here&utm_campaign=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&source=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx") Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress on [Facebook](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d940b/72735be7/30be32f4/1e1019f8/2874800451/VEsC/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.bsd.net/Facebook?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=4+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&source=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d940b/72735be7/30be32f4/1e1019fb/2874800451/VEsD/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.bsd.net/Twitter?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=5+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&source=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d940b/72735be7/30be32f4/1e1019fa/2874800451/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://go.drkimschrier.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&source=em21_210514_mm1_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx") from Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress emails.

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Glenn Youngkin is attacking Obamacare, do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
We can’t let him take it away
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29177432/285577794/-2023814932?refcode=20210514_TM_5AO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzM5YmM0YS1mMGI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ib7dgiYL1O8selzXrb049v3mS6VjlgpOUuDDKNa7TXM=)

| | Derek,

My Trump-endorsed opponent Glenn Youngkin HATES Obamacare and Medicaid expansion in Virginia.

In fact, according to the New York Times, expanding health care coverage to hundreds of thousands of Virginians makes him “sad.”

But here’s the thing, instead of crying about people getting health care, Glenn Youngkin should be offering the 700,000 uninsured Virginians solutions to their most urgent health care needs.

I want to know -- do you agree with me that we need to increase access to affordable health care for all Virginians, or do you agree with my Trump-endorsed opponent Glenn Youngkin that the Affordable Care Act shouldn’t exist? | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29177433/285577795/-397186248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzM5YmM0YS1mMGI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ib7dgiYL1O8selzXrb049v3mS6VjlgpOUuDDKNa7TXM=&emci=2dda0012-c3b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=3c39bc4a-f0b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=7540477)
---
The fact is, we’re still in the thick of the worst pandemic in American history, and 700,000 Virginians - including 100,000 children - don't have access to health insurance. We NEED to expand access to affordable health care for all Virginians, Derek.

Despite radical Republicans like Glenn Youngkin, Donald Trump, and Ted Cruz’s constant efforts to eliminate Obamacare, it’s standing strong.

**[But there’s clearly more work to be done. I want to know -- what are your health care priorities?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29177434/285577796/-397186248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzM5YmM0YS1mMGI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ib7dgiYL1O8selzXrb049v3mS6VjlgpOUuDDKNa7TXM=&emci=2dda0012-c3b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=3c39bc4a-f0b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=7540477)**
[TELL US WHAT YOU THINK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29177435/285577797/-397186248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzM5YmM0YS1mMGI0LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ib7dgiYL1O8selzXrb049v3mS6VjlgpOUuDDKNa7TXM=&emci=2dda0012-c3b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=3c39bc4a-f0b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=7540477)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Eric Swalwell: "You don't tell me what to f***ing do!"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
Peter, the day after Nancy Pelosi calls for me to be
investigated for confronting AOC, Eric Swalwell cornered one of
my staff members and exploded in anger.
"You don't tell me what to f***ing do!"
Swalwell hissed.
Why? Because my staff member commented "Biden
says you can take off your mask."
Eric Swalwell is unhinged.
This is what my staff and I deal with in the
swamp on a weekly basis.

And now, with the Fake News Media piling on,
Pelosi's Democrat henchman are working to EXPEL me again from
Congress.
This is outrageous and yet another attempt to
overturn an election!

Will you stand with me and chip in $25
right away?
Defunding the police, ripping America's
southern border wide open, Democrats packing the Supreme Court, a
federal takeover of America's elections. . .
These are just some of the socialist power
grabs Democrats are fighting for every singe day.
On top of it all, AOC wants to ram her
Socialist job-crushing Green New Deal on the American people.
But I'm fighting every single day in the
Swamp to stop the socialists from bringing America to it's knees.

That's EXACTLY why they want me investigated
and expelled from Congress.

STAND WITH MTG -- RUSH DONATE $25
Because I fought to hold hate-America leftist
Maxine Waters accountable. . .
. . .because I filed Articles of Impeachment
against Joe Biden. . .
. . .because I'm working to FIRE FAUCI. . .
Nancy Pelosi's Democrats are -- once again!
-- trying to expel me from Congress!
And if that doesn't work, the Democrats are
preparing for an onslaught of negative attack ads against me in
next year's elections!
I'm talking about TENS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS
TO DEFEAT ME.
Will you please help me fight back with an
emergency $25 or more chip in right away.
I'm under constant assault from the most
radical socialists in Washington, D.C.
In fact, on top of Democrats trying to remove
me from office, the Fake News writes nonstop hit pieces, and the
Silicon Valley Cartel is always trying to shut me down.
But I will not be intimidated or silenced
because I have the support of you, the people!
If you stand with me, please, chip in with
whatever you can afford. Every bit helps me fight back through
email, text messages, phone calls and even social media (when I'm
not censored!).
Even if it's just $10, every dollar goes a
long way.
Thanks so much. I will keep you updated.
-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Marjorie
Taylor Greene's People Over Politicians Committee - a joint
fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Greene for
Congress and Save America Stop Socialism PAC. Marjorie Taylor
Greene's People Over Politicians Committee PO Box 1575, Roswell,
Georgia 30077

name: Mark Kelly
subject: No one, not even me, expected this...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
You’ve been hearing a lot from my team this week. So I wanted to make sure you had a chance to hear from me too because this has been an important week for our campaign. Can I have a minute to explain?
We have to keep up our fundraising momentum now that a major National Republican and Trump donor announced he is running against us. He’s already spent $337,896 on TV ads 18 months before the election.
And if you thought that was bad, the National Republican Senatorial Committee stepped in and launched tens of thousands of dollars in ads of their own recently. A sign that Arizona is one of the most important battlegrounds for them in the 2022 midterm elections.
Look, we completely expected the attack ads to come, but now they are coming **_18 months**_ before I’m up for reelection again.
I love representing the great people of Arizona in the U.S. Senate. And this attack ad or the next one or the one after that won’t be enough to keep us from holding this seat, if we all come together and fight for it.
**That’s why your support is so important and why today I have to humbly ask:**
[**If you’re able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our goals and hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210514-1-15&t=1&refcode2=600_6688874_TzRrPr&akid=600%2E6688874%2ETzRrPr)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210514-1-15&t=2&refcode2=600_6688874_TzRrPr&akid=600%2E6688874%2ETzRrPr) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210514-1-15&t=3&refcode2=600_6688874_TzRrPr&akid=600%2E6688874%2ETzRrPr)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210514-1-15&t=4&refcode2=600_6688874_TzRrPr&akid=600%2E6688874%2ETzRrPr) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210514-1-15&t=5&refcode2=600_6688874_TzRrPr&akid=600%2E6688874%2ETzRrPr)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210514-1-15&t=6&refcode2=600_6688874_TzRrPr&akid=600%2E6688874%2ETzRrPr) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210514-1-15&t=7&refcode2=600_6688874_TzRrPr&akid=600%2E6688874%2ETzRrPr)
---|---
I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you’ve put into this campaign. It means the world to me to have so many of you supporting us and this fight for our shared values.
Full speed ahead!
— Mark
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210514-1-15&t=8&refcode2=600_6688874_TzRrPr&akid=600%2E6688874%2ETzRrPr)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=600%2E6688874%2ETzRrPr).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: Harold
subject: Wanted you to be the first to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Earls for Georgia |
body:
Say hello to the newest member of our team. | |
---
Hey Peter -

I wanted you to be the first one to meet the newest member of Team Earls - Truett Coleman.

|
---
|
---
We are so excited to welcome this little guy into the world!

I wanted to give you a heads up that I’m going to be taking a couple of days off from campaigning so I can help Rachel out as much as possible as we adjust to life as a family of 5.

You may still hear from folks on my campaign as we are going to keep the momentum rolling, but I want to take some time and make sure I’m focusing on what matters most these next couple days - my family.

Thanks for your thoughts and prayers throughout this process. I can’t tell you how much Rachel and I appreciate them!

\- Harold

Sent from my iPhone
|
---
---
---
| |

You may still hear from folks on my campaign as we are going to keep the momentum rolling, but I want to take some time and make sure I’m focusing on what matters most these next couple days - my family. Thanks for your thoughts and prayers throughout this process. I can’t tell you how much Rachel and I appreciate them! \- Harold Sent from my iPhone | | | | Paid for by Earls for Georgia | | 824 S Milledge Ave Ste 101, Athens, GA 30605 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

subject: Flagging something for you

body:
Do you have a minute?

****
****
Fellow Conservative, Steve Scalise here. I just got out of a meeting with my team and I have a **bad** feeling.

It sounds like we are WAY behind on our May fundraising goal. And even worse, the Democrats are far ahead of us. House Republicans are on the verge of being dangerously underfunded -- and the consequences of that are _dire_.

My Republican colleagues and I work day in and day out to preserve Trump's legacy, make a conservative agenda in the House possible, and restore commonsense conservative values in Washington. With Biden in the White House, Pelosi as Speaker, and Schumer in the Senate, **we 're watching all of that slip away**.

If you care about helping Trump and his conservative patriots fighting in the House, this is your opportunity to step up.** We've unlocked 500% Matching for today ONLY to jumpstart reaching our mid-month fundraising goal. **

[**STAND WITH US NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001829Wce0zLZ2TKx6CheDs4ez2CozdZL6oreUgmq_xKBe7K1023JJihNuRY0_23cHCvLGZjHOHatQmMUtFBRDIue0n8PAvRjmkl6dA0Yi5HcjhbgnLhMWefWSWxTiGP86NxUVv8zo-7Xvt7TFoMJuCp5WHMp3Zo0t5W9VhtkPVjsCEIV9H5_-_FDrCU4e793qcofpagKZeGUnWGfztdSFlJr8TL_vmR1RlALxYz4EjgiynlA6i5Bs7ZIMm6IUmTfDXyYgJggQaAHXTRJ7do8aNTXxp9CBK12EdhjgU1kp3wecvm58YPifTX-vHq4ZgV_nEKO_G2TvZwhwSxAh09WjPcxAwT-MSU7nEwMkbsHH57m5_snVNL5CMErjnWsizYPcLeuIDVFwMV2rDUmMKOBbyCzetR2qaXYRbZkN8sqt523M=&c=C-bieXulxb46EyLWNiUngg3_p7H24H5Vy1oDxDxxLoeIj-CChkPzOw==&ch=m2WPKh00m5_Ry5p6f4g3ik3MRX7EKWN5q9Q60aiVkqwSYeLqvRat3w==)

The Left isn't going to stop until they've destroyed Trump's legacy and successfully infiltrated America with their Socialist ideas. We need every Trump patriot to stand with us immediately - if we wait even one more day, _it 's going to be too late._
