clean_body: Do you have a minute? ** Fellow Conservative, Steve Scalise here. I just got out of a meeting with my team and I have a bad feeling. It sounds like we are WAY behind on our May fundraising goal. And even worse, the Democrats are far ahead of us. House Republicans are on the verge of being dangerously underfunded -- and the consequences of that are dire. My Republican colleagues and I work day in and day out to preserve Trump's legacy, make a conservative agenda in the House possible, and restore commonsense conservative values in Washington. With Biden in the White House, Pelosi as Speaker, and Schumer in the Senate, we 're watching all of that slip away. If you care about helping Trump and his conservative patriots fighting in the House, this is your opportunity to step up. We've unlocked 500% Matching for today ONLY to jumpstart reaching our mid-month fundraising goal. == == == == == The reason I'm emailing you today is that I was told you're a true believer in what President Trump fought for: 1. strong borders 2. low taxes 3. America FIRST If that was a mistake, I'll move on to the next patriot - but I don't think you'll let us down. == The Left isn't going to stop until they've destroyed Trump's legacy and successfully infiltrated America with their Socialist ideas. We need every Trump patriot to stand with us immediately - if we wait even one more day, it 's going to be too late. America is worth saving. body:
The Democrats want to pack the Supreme Court with radical activist judges who will rubber-stamp their Socialist agenda. Judge Judy's verdict: DUMB

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ulxxHtg69sruRT5JIm64vea4aTbyfE52LenjqVbNlBpeR4gb8OSQWsJep3PNeK0uvg58AIgxpp7knkNrJBYmcL7eSVrbULmbSXaVVmbAbrnhptVyfT4KZwi1Bm_Es2kDbdjcnAvu-Ow6wsQPzezPi9j0T79nt6Kdx_sg4_UFyqx1GPv4Z_gDfl_nsWq4u1qGXAq64XePsVHYqVIoZbQ8m3CKcJRavNwmrZbU2lcWUnQd1kZ9ALBYydhacnIl4lhHOxIzBUOD4PF9RavmxJoDMLLNzi5y8X5xE9Fi-y0NihT253PBADyk57UtiVCbxT92Ckni2HAUOokIHHoVRpHBopyuKfb3ER2wy5DWUxMV8s6a3frXcUNQXj2NwmXgTWjBUPyN3H4zhYE0YmXs_9yDpn7Ozqy4cjMRuarWLLgsq8QBfqyChHWiTrZiT7OXQVzWqxdilrSkNI6gMfR0rbiHczuZdIcG4NVR&c=Tqrlo8civnfgSEqDxhepk-dN-Rwmrbd5Ae3HNkrnwH0QMBQPEAu9hQ==&ch=XqF9GkgYC6SP86HDn7Ru5C2Z47jN3bUopZ-UPGYbqs_5C6T25AHSog==)

The Democrats want to pack the Supreme Court with radical activist judges who will rubber stamp their Socialist agenda.

**Judge Judy 's verdict: DUMB**

_We couldn 't agree more. _In fact, we think it's downright dangerous. [**Can we count on you to STAND UP TO COURT PACKING?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ulxxHtg69sruRT5JIm64vea4aTbyfE52LenjqVbNlBpeR4gb8OSQWsJep3PNeK0uvg58AIgxpp7knkNrJBYmcL7eSVrbULmbSXaVVmbAbrnhptVyfT4KZwi1Bm_Es2kDbdjcnAvu-Ow6wsQPzezPi9j0T79nt6Kdx_sg4_UFyqx1GPv4Z_gDfl_nsWq4u1qGXAq64XePsVHYqVIoZbQ8m3CKcJRavNwmrZbU2lcWUnQd1kZ9ALBYydhacnIl4lhHOxIzBUOD4PF9RavmxJoDMLLNzi5y8X5xE9Fi-y0NihT253PBADyk57UtiVCbxT92Ckni2HAUOokIHHoVRpHBopyuKfb3ER2wy5DWUxMV8s6a3frXcUNQXj2NwmXgTWjBUPyN3H4zhYE0YmXs_9yDpn7Ozqy4cjMRuarWLLgsq8QBfqyChHWiTrZiT7OXQVzWqxdilrSkNI6gMfR0rbiHczuZdIcG4NVR&c=Tqrlo8civnfgSEqDxhepk-dN-Rwmrbd5Ae3HNkrnwH0QMBQPEAu9hQ==&ch=XqF9GkgYC6SP86HDn7Ru5C2Z47jN3bUopZ-UPGYbqs_5C6T25AHSog==)

The Democrats have already introduced legislation to add FOUR justices to the Supreme Court. They refuse to accept President Trump's conservative Majority and are willing to tear down the foundation of our nation to win.

[**STOP COURT PACKING**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ulxxHtg69sruRT5JIm64vea4aTbyfE52LenjqVbNlBpeR4gb8OSQWsJep3PNeK0uvg58AIgxpp7knkNrJBYmcL7eSVrbULmbSXaVVmbAbrnhptVyfT4KZwi1Bm_Es2kDbdjcnAvu-Ow6wsQPzezPi9j0T79nt6Kdx_sg4_UFyqx1GPv4Z_gDfl_nsWq4u1qGXAq64XePsVHYqVIoZbQ8m3CKcJRavNwmrZbU2lcWUnQd1kZ9ALBYydhacnIl4lhHOxIzBUOD4PF9RavmxJoDMLLNzi5y8X5xE9Fi-y0NihT253PBADyk57UtiVCbxT92Ckni2HAUOokIHHoVRpHBopyuKfb3ER2wy5DWUxMV8s6a3frXcUNQXj2NwmXgTWjBUPyN3H4zhYE0YmXs_9yDpn7Ozqy4cjMRuarWLLgsq8QBfqyChHWiTrZiT7OXQVzWqxdilrSkNI6gMfR0rbiHczuZdIcG4NVR&c=Tqrlo8civnfgSEqDxhepk-dN-Rwmrbd5Ae3HNkrnwH0QMBQPEAu9hQ==&ch=XqF9GkgYC6SP86HDn7Ru5C2Z47jN3bUopZ-UPGYbqs_5C6T25AHSog==)

This is a threat to our nation. This is a threat to freedom. If Pelosi, Schumer, Harris, and Biden succeed, there will be no checks and balances. No one will be able to stop them from shoving their socialist agenda down our throats and dismantling this great country in the process.

[**STOP COURT PACKING**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ulxxHtg69sruRT5JIm64vea4aTbyfE52LenjqVbNlBpeR4gb8OSQWsJep3PNeK0uvg58AIgxpp7knkNrJBYmcL7eSVrbULmbSXaVVmbAbrnhptVyfT4KZwi1Bm_Es2kDbdjcnAvu-Ow6wsQPzezPi9j0T79nt6Kdx_sg4_UFyqx1GPv4Z_gDfl_nsWq4u1qGXAq64XePsVHYqVIoZbQ8m3CKcJRavNwmrZbU2lcWUnQd1kZ9ALBYydhacnIl4lhHOxIzBUOD4PF9RavmxJoDMLLNzi5y8X5xE9Fi-y0NihT253PBADyk57UtiVCbxT92Ckni2HAUOokIHHoVRpHBopyuKfb3ER2wy5DWUxMV8s6a3frXcUNQXj2NwmXgTWjBUPyN3H4zhYE0YmXs_9yDpn7Ozqy4cjMRuarWLLgsq8QBfqyChHWiTrZiT7OXQVzWqxdilrSkNI6gMfR0rbiHczuZdIcG4NVR&c=Tqrlo8civnfgSEqDxhepk-dN-Rwmrbd5Ae3HNkrnwH0QMBQPEAu9hQ==&ch=XqF9GkgYC6SP86HDn7Ru5C2Z47jN3bUopZ-UPGYbqs_5C6T25AHSog==)

We can't let that happen. [**Can we count on you to fight back?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ulxxHtg69sruRT5JIm64vea4aTbyfE52LenjqVbNlBpeR4gb8OSQWsJep3PNeK0uvg58AIgxpp7knkNrJBYmcL7eSVrbULmbSXaVVmbAbrnhptVyfT4KZwi1Bm_Es2kDbdjcnAvu-Ow6wsQPzezPi9j0T79nt6Kdx_sg4_UFyqx1GPv4Z_gDfl_nsWq4u1qGXAq64XePsVHYqVIoZbQ8m3CKcJRavNwmrZbU2lcWUnQd1kZ9ALBYydhacnIl4lhHOxIzBUOD4PF9RavmxJoDMLLNzi5y8X5xE9Fi-y0NihT253PBADyk57UtiVCbxT92Ckni2HAUOokIHHoVRpHBopyuKfb3ER2wy5DWUxMV8s6a3frXcUNQXj2NwmXgTWjBUPyN3H4zhYE0YmXs_9yDpn7Ozqy4cjMRuarWLLgsq8QBfqyChHWiTrZiT7OXQVzWqxdilrSkNI6gMfR0rbiHczuZdIcG4NVR&c=Tqrlo8civnfgSEqDxhepk-dN-Rwmrbd5Ae3HNkrnwH0QMBQPEAu9hQ==&ch=XqF9GkgYC6SP86HDn7Ru5C2Z47jN3bUopZ-UPGYbqs_5C6T25AHSog==)

Thank you,

House Conservatives

body:
California’s middle class is dwindling thanks to some of the highest taxes in the nation. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/480faf18448b3033/4b67f5627022d1aec3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, Californians are suffering under the weight of some of the highest taxes in the nation. Our middle class is shrinking as families and small businesses are leaving the Golden State in droves, but it doesn’t have to be that way. **I just released my tax plan, which is centered around the largest middle-class tax cut in California history.** Gavin Newsom has failed hardworking California families and individuals. Under his one-party rule in Sacramento, taxes continue to skyrocket for every Californian. Gas taxes. The state income tax. Sales tax. It’s never enough. **That’s why I knew I needed an actual plan to turn things around. A plan that puts thousands of dollars back into the pockets of every middle-class taxpayer in California!** _If you agree that Californians are taxed enough already and are in desperate need of a BREAK, please make a grassroots contribution to help get the word out that I have a plan to make things right in the Golden State._ [**MAKE A $10 GRASSROOTS DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/480faf18448b3033/eed89e80578dcf44c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**MAKE A $25 GRASSROOTS DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/480faf18448b3033/292b86e11afefc32c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**MAKE A $50 GRASSROOTS DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/480faf18448b3033/902c3396cf3fff4cc3d6b838967d376c/34943) We have to ease the burden on Californians and make our state more affordable. Please help me get the message out to the voters, and get them to the ballot box! With your help, we can begin the California Comeback. Thanks for your support,
Kevin Faulconer [**RUSH A DONATION TO TAKE BACK CALIFORNIA >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/480faf18448b3033/66b85df16de5afdac3d6b838967d376c/34943) id:2021-05-05-18:55:44:776t | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/480faf18448b3033/dcc5dafc2135c1d8c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/480faf18448b3033/cec566b74d43e2efc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/480faf18448b3033/aaa047dc259b7ffac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/480faf18448b3033/ddb7ad0fe463062dc3d6b838967d376c/34943)

Can you guess which state I’m describing, Peter?

Dangerous inmates being released early; botched COVID vaccine rollout; crippling shutdowns; income, sales, gas, and property taxes through the roof; America’s second highest unemployment rate, people and businesses fleeing en masse...

California Governor **Gavin Newsom** ’s arrogant, elitist actions and failed policies have devastated our state - **which is why 2 million Californians from all walks of life signed a petition to recall him, setting up a huge recall election this Fall.**

But with months to go before California voters have the opportunity to reject Gavin Newsom - and elect someone who knows how to govern - he’s calling in the “big guns” to help him evade the reckoning he deserves.

That’s right, Peter. Fellow radical San Francisco leftist, Vice President **Kamala Harris** , is back in California to prop up Gavin Newsom, declaring that he has the **Biden-Harris White House’s “unambiguous” backing** - and that their administration _“will be supportive as much as we possibly can”_ to help defeat our recall.

Newsom, Pelosi and Kamala Harris are all San Francisco leftists. So, it’s no surprise that Harris would show up to defend Newsom and his abject failure in California - because they’re all working to punish the rest of America with the same disastrous, radical, leftist schemes that have brought the Golden State to its knees.

We know that stopping the Left’s ruinous schemes here in California will provide not only a new opportunity for our state to recover and thrive but **will set the momentum for rolling back the dangerous Newsom-Harris-Pelosi agenda nationwide!**

clean_body: We are seeking your help now to help balance the scales in our fight to recall California Gov. Gavin Newsom and throw off the liberal establishment. | Can you guess which state I’m describing, Peter? Dangerous inmates being released early; botched COVID vaccine rollout; crippling shutdowns; income, sales, gas, and property taxes through the roof; America’s second highest unemployment rate, people and businesses fleeing en masse... California Governor Gavin Newsom ’s arrogant, elitist actions and failed policies have devastated our state - which is why 2 million Californians from all walks of life signed a petition to recall him, setting up a huge recall election this Fall. But with months to go before California voters have the opportunity to reject Gavin Newsom - and elect someone who knows how to govern - he’s calling in the “big guns” to help him evade the reckoning he deserves. That’s right, Peter. Fellow radical San Francisco leftist, Vice President Kamala Harris , is back in California to prop up Gavin Newsom, declaring that he has the Biden-Harris White House’s “unambiguous” backing - and that their administration “will be supportive as much as we possibly can” to help defeat our recall. Newsom, Pelosi and Kamala Harris are all San Francisco leftists. So, it’s no surprise that Harris would show up to defend Newsom and his abject failure in California - because they’re all working to punish the rest of America with the same disastrous, radical, leftist schemes that have brought the Golden State to its knees. We know that stopping the Left’s ruinous schemes here in California will provide not only a new opportunity for our state to recover and thrive but will set the momentum for rolling back the dangerous Newsom-Harris-Pelosi agenda nationwide! By nationalizing resistance to the recall election, VP Harris is seeking to fire up California liberals, saving Gavin Newsom’s job, and ensuring that the same leftist agenda continues not only in Sacramento, but in Washington, D.C., too. to expose the truth about Gavin Newsom’s failure in California will go a long way toward helping us break through the Democrat propaganda and liberal media noise to finally hold him accountable and topple the liberal establishment! Will you please step forward Thank you, Peter - Sincerely, Tom Del Beccaro, Chairman Rescue California - Recall Gavin Newsom | Paid for by Rescue California - To Support the Recall of Gavin Newsom. Israel needs our help. But Democrats are mishandling this conflict.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9667847/224717773/188340/10/).

body:
Moms in Office is changing the game with a future-minded focus by providing the kind of support to women in politics that truly makes a difference. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29182682/285593964/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxZjMyYzJjLTAzYjUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lDzgRD15o9sse1YMj42z7RoTj3KFX5V-LdgijfCZC4E=&emci=2de75169-ecb4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=c1f32c2c-03b5-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, It's official. I am so excited to announce the**first-of-its-kind Childcare Fund** by Moms in Office in collaboration with **[Helpr](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29182685/285593965/-312501930?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxZjMyYzJjLTAzYjUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lDzgRD15o9sse1YMj42z7RoTj3KFX5V-LdgijfCZC4E=&emci=2de75169-ecb4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=c1f32c2c-03b5-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=2884131)**! Campaigning for an elected position is a full time, unpaid job, meaning that many qualified women with caregiving responsibilities don’t run for office. They can’t afford to give up their jobs and take care of their families, all while running a campaign. **[This is where the Childcare Fund comes in — The Fund will provide assistance for candidates with caregiving responsibilities so that they can focus on running for office.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29182687/285593966/600483780?refcode=0514&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxZjMyYzJjLTAzYjUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lDzgRD15o9sse1YMj42z7RoTj3KFX5V-LdgijfCZC4E=)** **But right now we are about halfway through May, and we are not halfway toward our goal.** Based on the number of donations we have received to fund our Childcare Support Program, we need to raise another $5,000 this month to keep it going. **Can you donate just one hour of care now to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal? ** **[Donate 1 hour of childcare](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29182688/285593967/600483780?refcode=0514&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxZjMyYzJjLTAzYjUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lDzgRD15o9sse1YMj42z7RoTj3KFX5V-LdgijfCZC4E=)** clean_body: Moms in Office is changing the game with a future-minded focus by providing the kind of support to women in politics that truly makes a difference. Hi Peter, It's official. I am so excited to announce thefirst-of-its-kind Childcare Fund by Moms in Office in collaboration with ! Campaigning for an elected position is a full time, unpaid job, meaning that many qualified women with caregiving responsibilities don’t run for office. They can’t afford to give up their jobs and take care of their families, all while running a campaign. = But right now we are about halfway through May, and we are not halfway toward our goal. Based on the number of donations we have received to fund our Childcare Support Program, we need to raise another $5,000 this month to keep it going. Can you donate just one hour of care now to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal? = = = = = = After working with candidates across the U.S. last year, it became clear to me that political organizations supporting women needed to be more intentional with their support. = Your contribution could help a mom decide to run for office because this kind of support is now available. It could also help a candidate with caregiving responsibilities win her race because we now have the ability to cover the cost of childcare. Thank you for making all of this possible! Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director = | | | | ---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . name: Laura Loomer
subject: Loomer Unleashed
body:
If you haven't heard, I'm running for Congress in 2022 and I'm more excited than ever.
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/CRKh9GGibisP8PrEp892wzuw/Z763FkYlvgzEoixZWmPuuTCg)
Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/CRKh9GGibisP8PrEp892wzuw/Z763FkYlvgzEoixZWmPuuTCg) If you haven't heard, I'm running for Congress in 2022 and I'm more excited than ever.

I learned so much from my run for Congress in 2020 and know EXACTLY what I need to do to win.

Before I get into that, we're 466 days away from the Republican Primary. Sounds like I have plenty of time, **but it 's not that far off and will FLY by**.

[**Can you chip in to help me meet our May fundraising goal?**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/CRKh9GGibisP8PrEp892wzuw/Z763FkYlvgzEoixZWmPuuTCg)

We need to raise $48,000 this month so we can get everything in place as early as possible.

So please, [**make a quick donation now**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/CRKh9GGibisP8PrEp892wzuw/Z763FkYlvgzEoixZWmPuuTCg).

In 2020, I played nice and did what I was told to do, to be the "respectable" candidate that the GOP leadership wanted.

I was told that if I did that and met fundraising goals, they'd support my race.

When I won the primary last year, I got a call from Ronna McDaniel, head of the RNC, who pledged to help my campaign.

But NOTHING happened. I was on my own throughout Election Day.

The RNC and NRCC didn't spend a dime to help my campaign - and I learned that if you're not "one of their good old boys," you're lucky if they just forget about you.

If you're a candidate they know they can't control, then they'll fight you in a cowardly way.

**I 'll never toe-the-line for the Establishment.** They know that.

Last year, I got word that party officials were advising major donors not to support my campaign. That is one of the worst things you can do to a candidate.

For 2022, they've put up an establishment Republican candidate against me who laughably talks about "Cancel Culture" and censorship, but the guy has never been censored by Big Tech and still posts to his Twitter account regularly.

It's a joke.

But it's okay. Because I know I have your support, and this year, **I 'm unleashed!**

I have NOTHING to gain from playing nice and being a quiet and complicit candidate that the political establishment wants to see.

As a matter of fact, **I 'm going to raise hell from now until Election Day!**

And we're going to gain so much support that establishment leaders will have to rethink their duplicitous ways and actually start fighting back against Biden and his Democrats in Congress.

[**Let 's show them the way!**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/CRKh9GGibisP8PrEp892wzuw/Z763FkYlvgzEoixZWmPuuTCg)
* **You have my pledge to be BOLD** , to be the fighter we need -- and you expect -- as a candidate and member of Congress.

* You have my pledge to not fall for false promises and false hope from the political establishment and RINO's if I simply keep my mouth shut and "behave."

* And you have my pledge that no matter how hard they try to stop me this time, no matter how far they go to push me to the sidelines . . . **I will NOT budge**.

We have two weeks left to hit our goal for the month, if you're able, [**please chip in as much as you can now and let 's do this!**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/CRKh9GGibisP8PrEp892wzuw/Z763FkYlvgzEoixZWmPuuTCg)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

It’s an unfortunate reality of our broken campaign finance system. But Martin knows his number one job is to fight for folks like you — not spend hours on the phone with big donors. name: Josh Hawley
subject: Good Read: The Washington Post’s Hit Piece On Josh Hawley Is Really A Hit Piece On All Conservatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Through their attacks against me, the left highlights their contempt against average, middle America. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=dbb5a545866f4ad38b9f66b162d36902&_e=6tsJGm8hUuLPkrCXSdenUVikp-JZWJsWWgeglH04h0HxgYMMU2lRU6vEoUgytJlCH_qiEz4zI1qIQcf91fCGbN-DT_oZr-k-SIsud9sGKWtO0X0onHPAvwaxF1bTEdAQ_IBFZFZEiPGS3CzJaWrMZSN94hUcTeSaiBtxDcXTZbfBvUZ75-yyXHet0TDzitOGj3B9XnfJ6eeO97-Mj4YRLNMJW_XXShKN0o5xi-Tenhk0XzWARZlHIl-5IXnyB-vkgk95TC-PS7tEFFnntDE6FrymRQ_tjylSN4C85Vl_31BFLXHmPag39QzrhjCGHhB_rbW7Qimwt5mZVDiYArBR4jR6C_sFVYaKc4ooYZRNDodfYvze4LnpQBSot16MaFOldlrCYyRDr5v7lTBV99EW7A%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
The left is obsessed with me — they write nasty articles about me every other week it seems, but they still don’t get it.

I’m sure they’re baffled that none of their attacks have stuck, but I know why.

When the New York Times and Washington Post attack me, they are writing what they wish was true, not what is **ACTUALLY** true.

Through their attacks against me, the left highlights their contempt against middle America.

Yesterday, [**The Federalist**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=dbb5a545866f4ad38b9f66b162d36902&_e=6tsJGm8hUuLPkrCXSdenUVikp-JZWJsWWgeglH04h0HxgYMMU2lRU6vEoUgytJlCOjycaGBlsUJn8M1TLy6N-FY4nwuLHOOGhXNUDq8kJrUmo4n6HVNiSXhfHQrJyvBbEWcJlTdT41-NHoJ65GExcfqS7JZ7CSyuuqKdLN0oN-DzyuCkpLulFPUCTmGMCoA8T6RrKlVyFyjsXBYg1Iy5CO81pARAnupaFAGOlAVVIZFa978qgXJDL5s1vBLYMx28Eyw_eHtAkZnlH_vI1bu_zDB2rMcEZUJdSntdLgfSve1bDDR803Wp705I1xbbz3_8R4baIkmfsAq0cO7Kut93CBFUhh4SpPhfuSWoXnDnXO76RI2wraSy8E88x49U6_pXY0PN8mVEm--DKWCQY6ESA42Y1K0YIo38gxHuBImiI2A%3D) published an excellent piece that cuts to the heart of the Left’s disdain for everyday Americans and conservatives.

John Daniel Davidson writes: “ _But for all this, the piece is not really about Hawley. It’s about ordinary Americans who live in small towns, go to church, and believe their country is a decent place worthy of their affection._ ”

Davidson continues to take the Washington Post journalist to task, writing, “ _The point is, according to Kranish, that if you come from an obviously racist, backwards place like this there’s a good chance you’re a racist, or at least racially insensitive. You know, like Hawley_.”

The Federalist articulates what we all know— growing up in a small town in middle America doesn’t make you racist, having strong religious beliefs doesn’t make you a bigot, and having concerns about election integrity doesn’t make you a conspiracy theorist.

The whole article is worth the read— [**check it out here**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=dbb5a545866f4ad38b9f66b162d36902&_e=6tsJGm8hUuLPkrCXSdenUVikp-JZWJsWWgeglH04h0HxgYMMU2lRU6vEoUgytJlCOjycaGBlsUJn8M1TLy6N-FY4nwuLHOOGhXNUDq8kJrUmo4n6HVNiSXhfHQrJyvBbEWcJlTdT41-NHoJ65GExcfqS7JZ7CSyuuqKdLN0oN-DzyuCkpLulFPUCTmGMCoA8Xo72VXc42DlceZT4HvTIIf2V7fJIkmFDMjebrboOY8CGsQIOfu55EOLZ1cddDdfN_MKHIr8hGiTV5ugPJG20eD6n0cdHlFFLQfF3-W90_LH2HKfW_z1U6nDSJuGwQDIKUq1brXcks5leNm49Axw4ItZxqbkNWziG38LmaCM5vMJOqSms4FDoIxhlz6jng76tECy8lP3qbF_NZnNUjSLD6_-WrQwxqgLqEyK0yHXPoa8%3D).

Josh Hawley

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Biden’s Return to the 70s
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It was quite the week for Joe Biden and his handlers. The president found a way to condense four years of Jimmy Carter’s hapless presidency into one.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470466?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Biden's Return to the 70s**_ It was quite the bad week for Joe Biden and his handlers. The president found a way to condense four years of Jimmy Carter’s hapless presidency into one week. Over the last few days we’ve experienced gas lines and shortages in several states, the highest inflation in over a decade, rockets raining down on one of America’s closest allies, Israel, the highest gas prices since 2015 and the worst jobs report in recent memory. For a guy who came to Washington in the 1970s, it should come as little surprise that the president has such an affinity for the days of “malaise.” Just over 100 days in and Biden and his handlers have done little to unite our country and move forward. Instead they’ve created crisis after crisis and are doing very little to fix the problems they've created.

Compare that to Indiana where we continue to surge ahead despite the negative headwinds from Washington. Governor Holcomb is building One Indiana for All and isn’t letting the disfunction at the national level slow the state down. In the last few months alone, Governor Holcomb has secured major job commitments from Amazon, Toyota, and Apple. These commitments will mean nearly $1 billion of investment into our state and nearly 3,000 new jobs for Hoosiers. As the governor said on Inside Indiana Business this week (link below) **_“Hope is alive and dirt is turning.” _**The rest of the nation can learn leadership and management lessons from Indiana and I can only hope Biden and his DC handlers are taking note.

Thanks Kyle

**Photo** : _Chairman Hupfer participates via Zoom in the Indiana Latino Institute's legislative advocacy virtual wrap-up session _
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=be483e75b9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Building One Indiana for All**_ **Governor Holcomb** sat down for an interview [on Inside Indiana Business with Gerry Dick](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a6c07dac08&e=1acd9bb3d6) to discuss Indiana's record breaking economic development numbers and the huge news that three of the world's biggest businesses have chosen Indiana to invest in Indiana and create new Hoosier jobs. In a ten day span, Apple, Amazon and Toyota announced plans to invest more than $1 billion and add nearly 3,000 jobs. Under **Governor Holcomb's **business friendly leadership and our pipeline of talented Hoosiers, Indiana will see continued investment and job creation for years to come!
[\--> Click here to watch the full interview <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b3bd06706b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Governor Holcomb** also delivered the address at [Trine University’s Commencement](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a1b459785a&e=1acd9bb3d6). Congratulations to the Trine University classes of 2020 and 2021! **Governor Holcomb** wishes you all the best in your future endeavors.

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb on Inside Indiana Business with Gerry Dick_
---
|
---
| _**GOP Spring Dinner is June 11!**_
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Congratulations Hucklebys!**_ Last Saturday our Indiana Republican Party Executive Director Matt Huckleby exchanged vows with his radiant bride Mallory “Malora” (King) Huckleby. It was a wonderful celebration highlighted by heartfelt toasts from the father of the bride, the maid of honor, one of the two the best men, and the groom’s new brother-in-law. We offer our deepest congratulations to the newlyweds and wish them a lifetime of love and happiness!
---
|
---
| _**2021 Session: Balancing Budgets and Paying Off Debt**_ The last few weeks we’ve used this space to share the good news coming out of the legislative session and this week we wanted to talk about our new state budget. Under Governor Holcomb and Republican legislators our [money](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=73964be872&e=1acd9bb3d6) is managed well. **_Republicans take our responsibility as stewards of tax dollars seriously._** And the results are clear for Hoosier taxpayers and job creators.
**_“The sky’s really the limit for where we end up in 10 or 20 years and that’s what we’re planning for.” -Governor Holcomb._**
The 2021 legislative session saw:
* Governor Holcomb sign Indiana’s **__ninth straight balanced budget.__**
* The state budget maintains a **_healthy reserve fund_**.
* The reserve protects taxpayers from a downturn.
* Helps maintain Indiana’s AAA credit rating (the highest rating available).
* Indiana appropriate conservative spending levels; opening opportunities for future tax cuts and reforms.
* The state budget funds priorities like education, infrastructure, and job attraction **_without growing government._**
* Continued decline of the state’s corporate tax rate.
* Indiana **_paying off debt and paying cash for projects._**
* $600M paid to pre-1996 teacher pensions
* $500M in federal stimulus for Unemployment Insurance Trust Fund
* Cash funding for South Shore and Westlake double tracking projects
* Other projects: a state archives building, new campuses for School for the Deaf and School for the Blind & Visually Impaired, two new state park inns, enhanced cyber security infrastructure, new state police post/lab, and Fall Creek Pavilion at Indiana State Fairgrounds.
* Paying cash makes these **_“one time” spends_** , not perpetual line items across multiple budget biennia.
* The legislature pass and Governor Holcomb sign a budget that invests in **_public health, infrastructure, and law enforcement._**
* In addition to the historic investments we’re making in K-12 education that we shared throughout last week.

Under Governor Holcomb, Indiana is proving that you **_can balance your books, fund your priorities, keep taxes low, and make strategic investments_** that will positively impact Indiana’s future.
**_“We went into the pandemic in such a strong fiscal position... we paid off debt, or avoided debt, to the tune of $1.6 BILLION dollars.” -Governor Holcomb_**
And job creators are [continuing to take notice](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a64d07802d&e=1acd9bb3d6) by choosing to invest in our state. In just the last couple weeks, we’ve had major job commitments from [Apple](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=33a281d6a7&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Toyota](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a4ce65426c&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Amazon](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=31c0fbb4cc&e=1acd9bb3d6). Those three companies alone **_will create nearly 3,000 _**jobs and **_invest nearly $1 billion _**in our state!
**“ _What that means for those communities is truly transformational.” -Governor Eric Holcomb._**
Governor Holcomb continues to provide steady, consistent leadership. We’ve weathered the storm through the COVID pandemic. States that lack the leadership and fiscal discipline Indiana is known for are making drastic cuts to their budgets while **_Indiana is roaring ahead._**
---

clean_body: It was quite the week for Joe Biden and his handlers. The president found a way to condense four years of Jimmy Carter’s hapless presidency into one.. | | | | | | | | Biden's Return to the 70s It was quite the bad week for Joe Biden and his handlers. The president found a way to condense four years of Jimmy Carter’s hapless presidency into one week. Over the last few days we’ve experienced gas lines and shortages in several states, the highest inflation in over a decade, rockets raining down on one of America’s closest allies, Israel, the highest gas prices since 2015 and the worst jobs report in recent memory. For a guy who came to Washington in the 1970s, it should come as little surprise that the president has such an affinity for the days of “malaise.” Just over 100 days in and Biden and his handlers have done little to unite our country and move forward. Instead they’ve created crisis after crisis and are doing very little to fix the problems they've created. Compare that to Indiana where we continue to surge ahead despite the negative headwinds from Washington. Governor Holcomb is building One Indiana for All and isn’t letting the disfunction at the national level slow the state down. In the last few months alone, Governor Holcomb has secured major job commitments from Amazon, Toyota, and Apple. These commitments will mean nearly $1 billion of investment into our state and nearly 3,000 new jobs for Hoosiers. As the governor said on Inside Indiana Business this week (link below) “Hope is alive and dirt is turning.” The rest of the nation can learn leadership and management lessons from Indiana and I can only hope Biden and his DC handlers are taking note. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend,
I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our mid-quarter deadline tomorrow.
Will you give me a moment to explain why your $3 is so important?
Pat Toomey's retirement means we're running for an open seat — and since it's the seat most likely to flip from red to blue next year, it's the most important Senate race in the country.
It's going to be a fierce competition. That's why a lot of our opponents are taking money from corporate PACs to try and get an advantage.
**But I refuse to do that. I'm running to represent working folks, not CEOs and big money.**
So my campaign is powered by grassroots donations — real people who believe in our movement, chipping in a few bucks at a time.
That's why I'm asking you to make a $3 contribution today. We set a must-hit goal of 1,000 donations during our mid-quarter fundraising drive, and we need your support to get the job done.
[If you're able, will you pitch in that $3 as part of our 72-hour fundraising drive? Your donation makes a powerful statement that people-power is greater than big money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29184230/285598460/-347207331?refcode2=4c849f7a-09b5-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&refcode=em210514-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzg0OWY3YS0wOWI1LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xx9b9-_R7ci6P4q4BITC-C2n5_yQrfeknr37kLVDikc=)

body:
I can't emphasize enough how strongly I condemn the atrocities being committed right now against Israel’s sovereignty and innocent Israeli civilians b Peter, I can't emphasize enough how strongly I condemn the atrocities being committed right now against Israel’s sovereignty and innocent Israeli civilians by the Iranian-backed terrorist Hamas organization. The United States must be a leader during this time and stand strong with our ally, Israel. Democrat weakness has led to new attacks on our allies and proves the need for strong supporters of Israel. Progressives like Susan Wild are beholden to the radical left like Rep. Ilhan Omar who use their position to link targeted Israeli airstrikes against known terrorist groups, such as Hamas, to the atrocious acts these terrorist groups have committed. Over the past week, Hamas has rained hell and fire on Israeli civilians with the sole intent of killing as many as possible. In stark contrast, Israel targets only strategic military installations and provides a warning to civilians in the area to preserve the lives of those human shields that Hamas uses indiscriminately. Rather than stand up for our ally and their right to defend themselves, progressives like Susan Wild bow to the “woke” culture that threatens America’s ability to be a leader for democracy and peace. To protect our crucial alliance with Israel, the only democracy in the Middle East, we need representatives who will be steadfast in their support for our ally in the face of blatant terrorism. I promise that when I am elected to serve the people of Pennsylvania, I will stand up for Israel when called upon with vigor. name: Deandrea Newsome
subject: Quick update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Let’s do this!!!
#
Hey, y'all! Deandrea here, the campaign chair for Erica Smith for U.S. Senate, with an important campaign update.
Last night, Jayla reached out about tomorrow’s critical mid-month fundraising deadline. Right now, we’re still $2,068.78 short. **[** _We don’t have much time left to close the gap. Will you pitch in $5 (or whatever you can) right now?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210514-1?refcode=em20210514-89&t=20&refcode2=89_3698_YznEKi&akid=89%2E3698%2EYznEKi)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210514-1?refcode=em20210514-89&t=21&refcode2=89_3698_YznEKi&akid=89%2E3698%2EYznEKi)**
**This goal is too important to fall behind on.** Erica is going up against a crowded and competitive primary field. That means we have a TON of work to do to spread Erica’s story and our vision for a North Carolina that works for everyone.
Reaching our goal will ensure that a scrappy, insurgent campaign like ours has what it takes to build a large, diverse, working-class coalition that can win this race and transform politics as we know it.
**[So, please, pitch in $5, or any amount you can afford, today to put your support behind our movement and help us raise $2,068.78 before midnight tomorrow.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210514-1?refcode=em20210514-89&t=22&refcode2=89_3698_YznEKi&akid=89%2E3698%2EYznEKi)**
Let’s do this!!!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210514-1?refcode=em20210514-89&t=23&refcode2=89_3698_YznEKi&akid=89%2E3698%2EYznEKi)
Deandrea
Deandrea Newsome
Campaign Chair
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210514-89-footer&t=24&refcode2=89_3698_YznEKi&akid=89%2E3698%2EYznEKi)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Gloria Steinem
subject: why I’m endorsing Jennifer Carroll Foy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Grace knows that our country's diversity brings us strength
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

In a minute I am going to ask you to **[split a contribution between my friend, Congresswoman Grace Meng, and our campaign](https://act.myngp.com/el/dKqc5ctYc8zl7ZcEP6wsPZVZPqlb5udJxyuF_Apn7oM=/2B5HlcXjXefAgcbnRGiW3Y79kSmamDAKpKU4MgxTbe0=?gpsid=50_115_18889&refcode=em21_210514_GrMeng_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210514_GrMeng_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)** , but first I want to tell you a little bit more about Grace and her tireless advocacy work for the Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Community.

Grace serves as First Vice-Chair of the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus (CAPAC) and as Chair of the Asian Americans & Pacific Islanders Rising & Empowering (ASPIRE) PAC. **In these roles, Grace supports AAPI candidates and elected officials and works to ensure that AAPI voices and concerns are heard in the political process.**

As Congresswoman, Grace has introduced numerous pieces of legislation to protect and stand up for members of the AAPI community. Most recently, she put forth a resolution to condemn the rise in anti-Asian sentiment and introduced the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act. I was proud to sign on as a co-sponsor for both of these efforts.

As the daughter of immigrants and proud member of the AAPI community, **Grace knows that our country 's diversity brings us strength.** But too many of our fellow elected leaders haven't stood on the right side of this issue. Instead, they've fanned the flames of misinformation and fear, and, as a direct result, we've seen a rise in violence against members of the AAPI community and other communities of color.

**Now more than ever we need strong advocates like Grace in Congress.[This AAPI Heritage Month, will you join me in supporting Grace by splitting a contribution between her campaign and ours?](https://act.myngp.com/el/dKqc5ctYc8zl7ZcEP6wsPZVZPqlb5udJxyuF_Apn7oM=/2B5HlcXjXefAgcbnRGiW3Y79kSmamDAKpKU4MgxTbe0=?gpsid=50_115_18889&refcode=em21_210514_GrMeng_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210514_GrMeng_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/dKqc5ctYc8zl7ZcEP6wsPZVZPqlb5udJxyuF_Apn7oM=/2B5HlcXjXefAgcbnRGiW3Y79kSmamDAKpKU4MgxTbe0=?gpsid=50_115_18889&refcode=em21_210514_GrMeng_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210514_GrMeng_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
---

Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/dKqc5ctYc8zl7ZcEP6wsPZVZPqlb5udJxyuF_Apn7oM=/fyf7308v8QtVArewFEejr2SheoUqKYpWZ-jrwH4T8WY=).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Punish violent rioters, like Florida does!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
DeSantis showed us the way |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b0ee97c6de&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c8010a5570&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, held by a Dem career politician I almost beat last year!**

Governor DeSantis has led on so many issues where other lesser politicians have failed us. From opening Florida, to fighting Big Tech, to combatting Critical Race Theory, he has made sure Florida has led the way.

I have to say, as a Floridian, I am proud and impressed. **_This is a rare and special Governor!_**

Recently, he led again- by enacting laws to punish and deter violent rioters, like those that have destroyed Portland, Seattle, LA, New York, Kenosha, and many other cities.

_Gov. Ron DeSantis on Monday signed into law Florida’s "anti-riot" bill, which increases penalties for crimes committed during riots and is aimed at "combating public disorder."

"If you look at the breadth of this particular piece of legislation, it is _the strongest anti-rioting, pro-law enforcement piece of legislation in the country_ ," DeSantis said at a press conference. "There’s just nothing even close."

The law, which goes into effect immediately, grants civil legal immunity to people who drive through protesters blocking a road and allows authorities to hold arrested demonstrators from posting bail until after their first court date. The legislation _increases the charge for battery on a police officer during a riot_ and adds language that could _force local governments to justify a reduction in law enforcement budgets_.

The bill allows people to _sue local governments over personal or property damages_ if they were determined to have interfered with law enforcement response during civil unrest. It also increases penalties for protesters who block roadways or deface public monuments and creates a new crime, "mob intimidation."

Republicans say the bill would protect law enforcement officers and help prevent public disorder following recent unrest in the U.S._

WOW. So this is what this legislation does:

---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1cacc1a78f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| There is only one way to stop the aggressive destruction of our cities and terrorizing of our innocent citizens: punish those responsible.

In many ways, these violent rioters are more like domestic terrorists. Similar violent Maoists needed to be put down harshly all over the world; it's time we recognized what these people are and who WE are.

Americans don't become Marxists. We FIGHT Marxists.

Every single day, more of our freedoms are getting taken by the woke crazies of the Biden Administration and their Antifa street army.

**Florida is fighting these Commie thugs. America should as well. I will support companion legislation at a Federal level, punishing these extremists who hate America.**

_Governor DeSantis of Florida is fighting them all- and with incredible efficiency._

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. _Now I'm back because America needs saving more than ever! I can beat him, I'm starting early, but I need you beside me!_

If you're like me, you value your freedom. If you're like me, you want to fight for it! [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=114aa6d3cb&e=afa21b7626)

[Can you join me in bringing Florida's successful legislation to Congress?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=823997b71e&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we need control of Congress. [Help me restore our freedoms and protect our innocent citizens from Communism!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=747cec8bf0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=abe9c402d9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=dd86f8eb90&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=96e55b2ab1&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=4ff346e675) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=4ff346e675).

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, We had another busy week on the campaign trail as Jane continues to build momentum for her America First campaign. Even though we are still one year out from the primary, the enthusiasm and support Jane is receiving from across the state is through the roof! Jane continues to share her message as a conservative disruptor, tackling the issues important to voters and gaining new supporters every day. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Statewide Listening Tour Rolls On** Last week, Jane kicked off a statewide listening tour to combat the “woke” education agenda infiltrating our children’s education curriculum. Joe Biden, Democrats, and leftist activists are pushing our schools to teach radical teachings like the Critical Race Theory. As Jane travels the state, she is hearing from parents all over that Critical Race Theory and other wild, leftist theories are seeping into our schools’ education curricula. Needless to say, parents are concerned. This week's second stop in Canton was met with more concerned parents. Jane is leading on this important issue making sure Ohio’s children are protected from this dangerous ideology. As a U.S. Senator, expanding school choice and combating these teachings will be a top priority of Jane’s. **From the Trail** In addition to continuing her listening tour, Jane traveled down to Washington County for their annual Lincoln Day Dinner. It was great to be with so many friends like State Central Committeeman Jim Carnes. Jane continues to see an enthusiastic response from Republicans across the state. They are fired up for 2022! **Latest Endorsements** This week, conservative leaders from Northwest and Northeast Ohio joined Jane’s America First campaign by endorsing her for U.S. Senate. With over 110 endorsements statewide, Jane continues to garner support from trusted leaders throughout Ohio. Full List of This Week’s Endorsements Beth Seibert – Allen County Commissioner Brian Winegardner – Allen County Commissioner Cory Noonan – Allen County Commissioner John Berlin – Mayor of Salem Tom Liebrecht – Putnam County Republican Party Vice Chair In addition to the support we received in Ohio, this week Jane garnered national attention as _Maggie’s List_ endorsed Jane for U.S. Senate. This was the group's first Senate endorsement for the 2022 cycle. Maggie’s List is a group created to empower women and increase the number of conservative women elected to federal office. The campaign is honored to have their support and endorsement. **Joe Biden Projecting Weakness ** While President Trump projected strength on a national and global scale, Joe Biden and Democrats are projecting weakness. There are multiple crises happening across the world as a direct result of this weakness: Iranian-backed Hamas is launching rockets on our ally, Israel, Russian-hackers attacked a U.S. oil and gas pipeline, our Southern Border immigration crisis is the worst it's been in decades, and China continues to flex it's muscles. President Trump garnered peace through strength, Joe Biden is creating violence through weakness. It is more crucial than ever that we return to America First policies that put America, our safety and our prosperity first and protected our allies around the world. That is what Jane will fight for in the U.S. Senate. As always, if you or anyone you know wants to get involved with Jane’s campaign, visit our website at [www.janetimkenforohio.com](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=781fef99d2f54e43a9138ff8f29654af&_e=-KgtStoGxIzhveAxhNI3QZByYUcgGZNkrKFam15uT_NV1rijfNVbmWGjP8CGodN_sPQ_r7EbsBfjOE9_as7_S6JBox64nBqT4c8LIiem5-Ny6_ROtAfOKsg8Lk-PZkfTDAANH6G-gTrWp19IAf9H3B8zgos3aKQXLJGlYrqM-CvGtoeCvu-FNj1UB-mLIZ6zh3ItpUmrhtM8PJKtwawVQjdMFpnFD4V-FrNSV0IZNGg-FJUWGu0_C7XsTfeNt94qTSKyu-BJWN-IFTPCU1v_aQ%3D%3D) and sign up to join the team today! Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=781fef99d2f54e43a9138ff8f29654af&_t=Yqqz2J4AOCfoROPk2z5QUKbWALerO4bTi9KNv3L3ns5an7YL70er1Sgz6t6XPsKnywz3kE_koEw2X95xB2WZkcSXe6EwvHgOb4Bv1t736DjzlooNpcnt_OcONAVEsbFD1Z3UwAOgS6F42YuDP7jjzvEJYeuXPdFlZzJYrHbEOYY%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=781fef99d2f54e43a9138ff8f29654af&_e=V0ZeZVYfjTzjEsWhIHtJ7pGRx_wk2p8xomW8hNW14MXdvI_NrC2O7uVd4iCIww9bW5tfijWSEDsOciISB4Q28TJRBOst236uKFathnBy294nONKSbkUgN2Y3edeD3A6ZlWi5Onqu2akRWAwmtlphlQGwGfbyU9QV-vZXc8rgKaX5iO5nyLzctoobIzhmd4tYIGDA0EIh6YAlq6KrsUxj3y3yLyMBBCKzcdARfukap0hs8PhGh_0tapL56O_MTB2wMyXNYPkC_DbMhnp1TzdpYGvbEpaFgMXf2K2SPhp0NXA%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=781fef99d2f54e43a9138ff8f29654af&_e=acKgOdCWoNF3cxJsZogYFtlrG00-QKF2-7qotL6HDjUG5BgybfDv153eZYUWuqoETegmCRaZeAQNH8uVwCpU-WkDnA7O50vqBU5sk1X8Cf31xcxNEyYWef04z7V9gqXltCKjGmoUW3zevDNyZfi_69wZjrrbyWwNeb_QGX70CqCVZzC7hoftN_0g5TYy-v88w3XIHD4WIgC5KyXNE89215rMIdrLTGcuje6-UUXDO8k1Kuw5PGM20FJTRYlMRBkHduRmsDSIOtvR3mNKJRlbzw%3D%3D)

name: Jackson Mariotti
subject: wanted to circle back on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29187140/285621218/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGU3MWFlMC0xOGI1LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KTgLlKrPvuSj0c948oCrKAcAe-n2RdkFkHYKXywisw4=)

body:
#
Peter, it's Lauren, Pramila's finance director!
Tomorrow is May 15th, which means we'll be exactly halfway through our fundraising quarter. This date is important because what we raise — or don't raise — will give us a pretty clear picture of whether or not we're on track to hit our fundraising goals before the big quarter ends on June 30th.
[**If we can raise $10,000 by midnight on Monday, we'll be in great shape! Can you contribute $3 or more today to help us get there?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210514?refcode=em20210514-289&t=19&refcode2=289_420207_dMx-Se&akid=289%2E420207%2EdMx-Se)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210514?refcode=em20210514-289&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=289_420207_dMx-Se&akid=289%2E420207%2EdMx-Se)**
Pramila doesn't accept corporate PAC money. Not one cent of it. Our movement believes that big money doesn't belong in politics because it influences lawmakers, their agenda, their decisions, and in many cases, their votes. We need lawmakers at every level of government working 100% for the people — not for corporations.
Of course, that makes fundraising a bit harder. And it makes grassroots donations critically important. But we built this campaign — and sent Pramila to Congress! — with supporters like you. **By keeping our fundraising on track, we'll ensure Pramila can stay focused on her fights for a wealth tax, a $15 minimum wage, Medicare for All, College for All, racial justice, and so much more.**
[**If we come together as a movement, I know that we can hit $10,000 by midnight on Monday (or sooner!). Contribute $3 or more today to help us hit this important mid-quarter goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210514?refcode=em20210514-289&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=289_420207_dMx-Se&akid=289%2E420207%2EdMx-Se)
Thank you so much for your support,
Lauren Lalonde
Finance Director
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210514-289-footer&t=22&refcode2=289_420207_dMx-Se&akid=289%2E420207%2EdMx-Se)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

**Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight _****_NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women **
---
|
---
| **Dear ****Derek,**

**As we navigate the mainstream media’s attempts to distract us from devastating democrat policies, I want to redirect our focus to some important issues facing Granite Staters. ****

H.R.1 remains to be a critical threat facing New Hampshire residents. Many already know that our Democrat Secretary of State Bill Gardner has loudly voiced opposition despite this bill being supported by fellow N.H Democrats Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan. Gardner has spoken up about the dangers of federalizing state elections on a national level, in addition to giving federal authorities the ability to steal New Hampshire’s ‘First in the Nation status’.

This week a second important group of [opinions were voiced](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fnhjournal.com%2Fnh-town-clerks-overwhelmingly-oppose-h-r-1%2F/1/010001796cd27c50-57910bf8-6da0-4fb9-8fed-af6a0c90dcca-000000/goGloqcNQo8rshTU8dfMWHE-Egs=214) denouncing H.R.1 - from the Granite Staters that deal with running our elections. It’s increasingly clear that H.R.1 is not for the benefit of our state, or our election processes - it's simply a federal power grab by D.C democrats. I implore anyone who has yet to contact Senator Maggie Hassan to refute this bill, to do so immediately. The future of New Hampshire’s elections rely on us taking immediate action against H.R.1.

****Additionally, I would like to congratulate Senate President Morse on his incredible event last night. With great turnout and constructive conversations, it’s clear Republicans from across the state are fired up and for success in 2022. Stay alert for future upcoming events to support republican leadership in New Hampshire! **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **This week, the House is hearing amendments which will protect you from overreach from Washington DC**
** __**
**Tuesday at 1:30, Executive Departments and Administration will be hearing amendment #2021-1443h. This amendment would prohibit discrimination based on vaccination status.**
**
Wednesday at 9:30, Election Law will hear amendment #2021-1445h. This amendment passing will mean that if HR1 Passes, then NH State laws remain in effect, making sure that New Hampshire has power to control it's own elections.****
_You can voice your support for these bills and sign up to testify in support of these amendments by clicking the link below! _**

| |

| |
**In this weeks Republican Spotlight, we would like to highlight a lifelong New Hampshire republican activist, Marilyn Huston. She is a dedicated member of her community, doing anything she can to help the greater good of our party. She has served have party dutifully as the previous Cheshire County Republican Committee Chair and is currently the NHGOP Area Vice Chair. On top of her activism in politics she is a loving mother and grandmother. Once again we would like to thank Marilyn Huston for all the work and effort she has put in over the years to make the NHGOP successful. We are excited to see what her leadership brings to the future. She is an incredible asset to our New Hampshire Republican team.**

body:
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f684d69f61e844d7a6a3f646b7590c4f&_e=nFg4QkUAVfpjAgV9lRM96bad_yEl0HFhYnVVoLl_ESwcpxllLnyfvf9G9UQjGS6tr-syDQLY2rZzEu4evYmpfwla9nvzIBhF_FIXdVJ1Y1yV1MBcF0QJX04tPcA6eYjBB-AE7LdKGGQb3wwuqjjd8yUz4XlnOsMOaZdKdumaLQfWfqZFOqYJ7Sz00sS9usgmLGRtKNHPjf_ad1ALYITiVmtuzqRZDzqSgqxyg9cfsI9K2Fhh2VTxF9YiRwbMraw1aRUReoALqR6RkSsROwTMPVaE-rSRufDy46Zl3C7d6bxKnFGNPiJxYExvGGs2S6TN5p3PG1VU26GpKasezAbTLWu9Njj_FBZlfm8AbNXyyNMCFiFGUhZoMjRw20d5pZslqr9cD4_iQWdio7R6dKoShQaeOABxUhoBhyC4GdzHpCg%3D) **** MAJOR ANNOUNCEMENT – I'M DONE WITH THEM! **** **[Your Support Now is CRITICAL>>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f684d69f61e844d7a6a3f646b7590c4f&_e=nFg4QkUAVfpjAgV9lRM96bad_yEl0HFhYnVVoLl_ESwcpxllLnyfvf9G9UQjGS6tr-syDQLY2rZzEu4evYmpfwla9nvzIBhF_FIXdVJ1Y1yV1MBcF0QJX04tPcA6eYjBB-AE7LdKGGQb3wwuqjjd8yUz4XlnOsMOaZdKdumaLQfWfqZFOqYJ7Sz00sS9usgmLGRtKNHPjf_ad1ALYITiVpcr85N5XpPnj-Dgy4fYxQtAyA400HDBRS3cbwui_dkplArj6o45e4z1MNHQNlJdBRYSkIgWJ6xzg_6TnC2aDl5HP1VlTHQ_9yjpXDLPClpy7GZl1wwveX2JaP0aBoyOEX6Mfe6GUUvwjjz2yciP0HlUYJc4ge4ayemh8nQAmKTiSmBvKMsxXIEm-qe_wS3JSHgslTwU_LWHhAq6mQ62Dow%3D)**
Peter, I’m OUTRAGED over this nonsense. I’m sure you are too. **It’s time to CUT OFF these “woke” corporations caving to**
**the left-wing mob over Georgia’s Election Integrity Act!** Joe Biden, Stacey Abrams, and the rest of the Democrats pushing these LIES are shameless. Major League Baseball, Coca-Cola, Delta, Boeing – they’ve clearly just bought into the left’s talking points without doing their homework. They have ZERO idea what this law actually does but are eager to trash it. The fact that we have “woke” corporations now enforcing Democrat orders is mind-boggling. **Today, I’m making a major announcement. And I wanted you to be among the first to know.** I am DONE with these corporations that have been fair-weather friends to conservatives and are now jumping on the extreme-left bandwagon. _I will no longer accept ANY contributions from a corporate PAC._ This makes grassroots support from patriots like you more important than ever. **[Rush a $5, $10, $25 $50, or $100 donation to sustain our fight against the “WOKE” agenda!>>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f684d69f61e844d7a6a3f646b7590c4f&_e=nFg4QkUAVfpjAgV9lRM96bad_yEl0HFhYnVVoLl_ESwcpxllLnyfvf9G9UQjGS6tr-syDQLY2rZzEu4evYmpfwla9nvzIBhF_FIXdVJ1Y1yV1MBcF0QJX04tPcA6eYjBB-AE7LdKGGQb3wwuqjjd8yUz4XlnOsMOaZdKdumaLQfWfqZFOqYJ7Sz00sS9usgmLGRtKNHPjf_ad1ALYITiVlYWzen8_jpXO4kBAT6Rl5-JL0pWd8TM4atl_pG0xOpus12VnckqMa5Eumn0djWMITwyh91Lo_oUuHtu_MYkkLerTWbgdNw_YJ_jv808irXkRgAk7J1Q54_D_MrR0OYZ9n_DT46QaerDUDwBuHQCA7UXkAkNsdkDiR3eCTcLEbU-cF1z2rNSAhGn3ff1zW1ZywJK6tRJnbYL_usvf8TDiys%3D)** [**🚨 DONATE HERE >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f684d69f61e844d7a6a3f646b7590c4f&_e=nFg4QkUAVfpjAgV9lRM96bad_yEl0HFhYnVVoLl_ESwcpxllLnyfvf9G9UQjGS6tr-syDQLY2rZzEu4evYmpfwla9nvzIBhF_FIXdVJ1Y1yV1MBcF0QJX04tPcA6eYjBB-AE7LdKGGQb3wwuqjjd8yUz4XlnOsMOaZdKdumaLQfWfqZFOqYJ7Sz00sS9usgmLGRtKNHPjf_ad1ALYITiViUrtc2NY0EDXsOavpG-qyKeb7QAlyLgFco-DdUiGwe-vkIUFEcpQfqKMoKxONjBkMTw4E5bCKEg2Fq7lvclpYr_cdkXyJYiz5fhL1Lzg9vVR3xcHNNJQW0hdB0hyRayjvCV3LdiM_BFtlw9F6W1cYkd4M1ON8oX1G5U6n_zHKNXTOAzVxBuMfj9UOVdMHWJpNhS7NDPaayxiVf2mI_0vVY%3D) It’s time to CUT OFF these woke enforcers in Washington. Enough is enough. They can’t wage war on our values and stuff their deep pockets with corporate welfare... clean_body: ** MAJOR ANNOUNCEMENT – I'M DONE WITH THEM! Peter, I’m OUTRAGED over this nonsense. I’m sure you are too. It’s time to CUT OFF these “woke” corporations caving to the left-wing mob over Georgia’s Election Integrity Act! Joe Biden, Stacey Abrams, and the rest of the Democrats pushing these LIES are shameless. Major League Baseball, Coca-Cola, Delta, Boeing – they’ve clearly just bought into the left’s talking points without doing their homework. They have ZERO idea what this law actually does but are eager to trash it. The fact that we have “woke” corporations now enforcing Democrat orders is mind-boggling. Today, I’m making a major announcement. And I wanted you to be among the first to know. I am DONE with these corporations that have been fair-weather friends to conservatives and are now jumping on the extreme-left bandwagon. I will no longer accept ANY contributions from a corporate PAC. This makes grassroots support from patriots like you more important than ever. It’s time to CUT OFF these woke enforcers in Washington. Enough is enough. They can’t wage war on our values and stuff their deep pockets with corporate welfare... These companies receive BILLIONS in government handouts, then turn around and endorse Democrat schemes to destroy the integrity of elections in our country! The powerful special interests and PACs won’t like this announcement. But I don’t care. We need leaders with backbones to STAND UP AND FIGHT for America’s future. Over the past nine years, I’ve received $2.6 million in contributions from corporate PACs. And I’m NEVER accepting another cent from them. It’s time to SAVE AMERICA from the “woke” left. It’s time to draw a line in the sand. I’m doing so, and I’m urging ALL my GOP colleagues in the U.S. Senate to do the same! Enough is enough of boardroom activist CEOs who believe they know better than us and thumb their noses at conservatives. ** For Liberty, Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

Biden, Pelosi and the Democrats have completely destroyed the economy, and rising gas prices are just the beginning! If you care about being able to leave your house and drive your car around while embracing the freedoms that being an American citizen affords you, you need to step up to stop the Democrats before they cause even more damage! This is why my team’s Mid-Month deadline is so important, and time is quickly running out to meet it: If you care about restoring President Trump’s great economy, you need to step up and meet this deadline before it’s too late. Thank you, Jim Banks, Chairman House Conservatives Fund Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. With your help, we can continue this fight for working families and pass****legislation****like paidleave. If you are able to split a donation, it will make all the difference.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29188174/285628971/1834377524?refcode=0514&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlYjRjMTYxLTIwYjUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ScoVrG9r9G5sSKVZIgILSGI8ik5rz0F37l_KTE3N2Ck=) All of us are so grateful for your support, especially at moments like this. **#momsquad for Katie Porter** [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29188177/285628972/1834377524?refcode=0514&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlYjRjMTYxLTIwYjUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ScoVrG9r9G5sSKVZIgILSGI8ik5rz0F37l_KTE3N2Ck=) Moms in Office

name: Rep. Elise Stefanik (House GOP Conference Chair)
subject: Personal note for dpwillis67@gmail.com - our shared priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
House Republicans have NEVER been more united to save our country from the Left!

To unsubscribe, visit [here](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk2Njk1ODE%3d&x=fc223015)
****
****
Fellow Conservative, it's Elise Stefanik.

Today I was elected House Republican Conference Chair. I wanted to take a moment to share with you my priorities and mission to fire Nancy Pelosi and put a stop to her radical socialist agenda.

_*****I am only sharing the below memo with a select group of True American Patriots -keep it away from any Democrats!*** **_

There is way too much at risk for people to be sitting idly on the sidelines. We are only _**5 seats**_ away from restoring our majority in Congress - if we can't make that happen, Trump's legacy will be TARNISHED.

Your support is critical to our success right now. While the Democrats are raking in the cash from dark money donors, we're relying on grassroots patriots like yourself to win each and every battle ahead.

So please read my memo below, and if you're committed to joining our fight to fire Nancy Pelosi and take back the House, [**please consider making a 6x matched contribution today >>>**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/200335/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=cc1fce0e)

_**Gifts 6x matched until midnight!**_
[**HELP ELISE TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/200335/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=b006c95c)

Thank you for your dedication to our Conservative movement! We cannot take back the House without you.

Regards,
Congresswoman Elise Stefanik
House Republican Conference Chair

[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/200335/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=82a3af53)

_**Gifts 6x matched until midnight!**_
[**HELP ELISE TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/200335/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=e51f369e)

[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/200335/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=4805ad1a)
**CONFIDENTIAL MEMO:**

**To** : GOP Patriots
**From** : Rep. Elise Stefanik, House Republican Conference Chair
**Date** : May 14, 2021

**RE: Our House GOP Priorities**

Fellow Conservative,

It is a tremendous honor to serve the American people in my new role as the House Republican Conference Chair.

Right now, our country is experiencing **an economic crisis** , **a border crisis** , **an energy crisis** , and **a national security crisis** \- all the while Nancy Pelosi and her Radical Leftist House Democrats continue to push their socialist agenda.

**Only our House Republicans stand between National Democrats and their goal of big government socialism.**

Our ONLY hope to defeat the Radical Left is to regain our majority in the House. [**Can I count on you to join me in the fight to take back the House for Republicans?**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/200335/7/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=19727a34)
_**Gifts 6x matched until midnight!**_ [**HELP ELISE TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/200335/8/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=113e5590)
As the newly elected House Republican Conference Chair, I want to share my priorities for our party so we can work together toward a common goal. This will not be an easy job, but I know we are stronger when united as a team.

Together, let's work to pass legislation that will accomplish the following for our great nation:
* Grow our economy
* Reopen our schools
* Promote American energy independence
* Secure our border
* Strengthen our national security
* Protect our Constitution

You know this all boils down to one thing: **PUTTING AMERICA FIRST**.

We cannot let the successes achieved under President Trump's leadership be tossed away by National Democrats. We MUST take back the House!
_**Gifts 6x matched until midnight!**_ [**HELP ELISE TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/200335/9/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=3901fe03)

I am excited to lead our House GOP Conference as Chair to protect America from the looming threat of socialism.

It is time for us to call upon our BEST supporters for help. We MUST call upon our grassroots activists on the ground so that we can defeat the National Democrats and their radical agenda.

[**Please, chip in any amount today and I 'll ensure it has 6x the impact in our mission to reclaim the House and ditch Nancy Pelosi once and for all.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/200335/10/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=5b1e8bc7)

Regards,
Congresswoman Elise Stefanik
House Republican Conference Chair********
_**Gifts 6x matched for the next hour!**_
****[**HELP ELISE TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9669581/224717773/200335/11/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=e0af617a)**** ********

Contributions to the Indiana Republican State Committee Inc (IRSC) are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions permissible under federal law will be deposited into the IRSC federal account, unless otherwise designated, and are subject to federal contribution limitations ($10,000 per year, per individual; $5,000 per year, per multi-candidate committee). Contributions not permissible under federal law will be deposited into the IRSC state account as permissible by law. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited. subject: H.R. 1 alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
****
Peter, Democrats are renewing their push to ram H.R. 1 through the U.S. Senate.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=24e613eb4cf640d687dedd780e866fd4&_e=N4b3TvqYir2xzXSIsudjPEzBE4VMdUd3Fsu44Q7ET8ZRqHgwXH9ulWAOSzRb_dPO32uhO8faL-bX9xSZeyoCokEDJQcap3rl7ZLjEe1gP36uDOhnQ9xfL1yt0ZhcK3_abmbYTkLchG2QrLsFTqrjxsQyqzFYCcU0R1SWFyvpuqV9Piwv7mJCe6yjGlkWE8tIq8-NeBwjp3mb_wgbTDSfgJ00_P4vl64esuItrw9UkR7bvsnxgaUD17lEUN_hc6h4En2mcO43BoY-QT5VK1tIx_SdlUL3iLov0eJKdc702i9-piRwwY_R0Deb5UzPsEjdWVeCU_KG7TPW6ji7qlrmeXrF4vRSF3zWmSNOdhqaFswY2HieHA7f4jlA75ZGGlION0q_XEh1Z7p1uT8-2Mz_WvjMfSEpaz0PVXgBBi7zi5Iwc_0BHF96v0H3_UBnSISE0Fl8PcCk9Xz-U5SiTHYHZw%3D%3D)
Peter,

Democrats are renewing their push to _ram_ H.R. 1 through the U.S. Senate.

H.R. 1 would put Democrats in charge of **our elections**. It would BAN voter ID. It would MANDATE ballot harvesting. And it would fund Democrat campaigns with YOUR tax dollars.

In other words -- H.R. 1 would give liberals **permanent and TOTAL power. **

I'm leading the fight to expose H.R. 1 for what it is -- a liberal power grab -- and to stop it in its tracks in the U.S. Senate.
